Peter - Turnout is key to winning Georgia’s Senate runoff election next Tuesday, December 6 |
---
Peter - Turnout is key to winning Georgia's Senate runoff election next Tuesday, December 6th.

Monday, early voting began in all 159 counties across the state, and voters in Georgia are turning out in record numbers:

[](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=aee118d0f8134c4ba66aa7a1b9d06734&_e=1X63nNwxaBbQI_gOTnIbccVEznlTo0KUkAaGsGjYcKKi3z5vH7IItlIjeNnyv-KwCwe8SEBPq6b3K-6PnarpQz5h2oT6Q3iXeZlwlsZm9kE1LU0uQ0O_uFHnQlKrmjChcn-yoV1F72p1L23AlZoEuwPAZ9OD9e7Lj5KKb0GaYJRpAoSu3fREKOpykmxXD6kdXXkiCtnyBYIDn92IkhZx7QPOrd4zrV-_FHCa855jKZkGCwSS-rBLYjdWGQl7AQGYZ14K8eXsfGS46YYC0KOy0x-MKVBxVPaDt-cR0G3QT-RnY1P-_6FWKJcxmXHzUAhBc2c__BFTDDaqV6wx7yr6ZjVcArTkd8IRRsgJJd8MQk-wxykrbGbD-fRX-2oPZytudb_pdQl_smrzE9zy7YG-Kc3MaWMA1HXEZGza37rweDF_gATgh2IFRqrmv5TorZmCiY_B6sHV2ZIC2M28Ulk57tmX64_kxOULgcruqKYPwd8%3D)
For the general election, we kept Senator Warnock under 50% of the vote - even after he spent over $100 MILLION on his campaign! Out of more than 3.9 million votes that were cast in this race, we were only 0.9% behind him.

_**Fast-forward three weeks to today, and new polling shows the RACE IS TIED once again!**_

**Therefore, the old adage about runoff elections is truer now more than ever:**

**Turnout is key.
Turnout is key.
Turnout is key.**
As you know, a strong voter turnout program costs money.

**I know you're tired of these emails, and we're tired of sending them. But the truth is the money we raise from short notes like this help fund the overwhelming majority of our turnout operation.**

[** HELP US REACH GEORGIA VOTERS ->**](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=aee118d0f8134c4ba66aa7a1b9d06734&_e=1X63nNwxaBbQI_gOTnIbccVEznlTo0KUkAaGsGjYcKKi3z5vH7IItlIjeNnyv-KwCwe8SEBPq6b3K-6PnarpQz5h2oT6Q3iXeZlwlsZm9kE1LU0uQ0O_uFHnQlKrmjChcn-yoV1F72p1L23AlZoEuwPAZ9OD9e7Lj5KKb0GaYJRpAoSu3fREKOpykmxXD6kdXXkiCtnyBYIDn92IkhZx7QPOrd4zrV-_FHCa855jKZkGCwSS-rBLYjdWGQl7AQGYZ14K8eXsfGS46YYC0KOy0x-MKVBxVPaDt-cR0G3QT-RnY1P-_6FWKJcxmXHzUAhBc2c__BFTDDaqV6wx7yr6Ztp7kZ1bDgDZb-gG_cYHYUSH0ZQv8wNOq5aOn1AGrzJT4AYWwCsh6-tSpKPPhbPooLF1DHTM901ezj96TSvKX8X9SAt2mqV_5NBRQZarXsEgNpSNzT_77rOjBENKtgZ4h7lwWYmHNmQ8sKj5TDcxbx4%3D)
**_With just SIX days remaining until the runoff election, I'm pleading with you to help us turn out more supporters._ [If you chip in $6 right now, we'll be able to contact a voter who otherwise probably won't cast a ballot next Tuesday - _and probably doesn't even know the date of the runoff election!_](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=aee118d0f8134c4ba66aa7a1b9d06734&_e=1X63nNwxaBbQI_gOTnIbccVEznlTo0KUkAaGsGjYcKKi3z5vH7IItlIjeNnyv-KwCwe8SEBPq6b3K-6PnarpQz5h2oT6Q3iXeZlwlsZm9kE1LU0uQ0O_uFHnQlKrmjChcn-yoV1F72p1L23AlZoEuwPAZ9OD9e7Lj5KKb0GaYJRpAoSu3fREKOpykmxXD6kdXXkiCtnyBYIDn92IkhZx7QPOrd4zrV-_FHCa855jKZkGCwSS-rBLYjdWGQl7AQGYZ14K8eXsfGS46YYC0KOy0x-MKVBxVPaDt-cR0G3QT-RnY1P-_6FWKJcxmXHzUAhBc2c__BFTDDaqV6wx7yr6ZtAmT2pjBu6mckdl0XvNA3gFhiBoocZ5Fh8fGHBRDqXYxeTiAkO6QPj_GdYpcuQ_Z5xF9sLEf4ME3Y_ZP6GdyJZ8p5XVBoO2r6QphdwrPNpRfRacHlWLLUb3N4CTX92AYfFqFhDVtNBGBT-2zpHjjks%3D)**

Georgia is on track to set new early voting records. Since most Democrats prefer to vote early while many Republicans like to vote on Election Day, a majority of the early votes cast were likely for my opponent. With early voting ending this FRIDAY, _it's critical that we expand our efforts to turn out as many supporters as possible._

[** HELP US REACH GEORGIA VOTERS ->**](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=aee118d0f8134c4ba66aa7a1b9d06734&_e=1X63nNwxaBbQI_gOTnIbccVEznlTo0KUkAaGsGjYcKKi3z5vH7IItlIjeNnyv-KwCwe8SEBPq6b3K-6PnarpQz5h2oT6Q3iXeZlwlsZm9kE1LU0uQ0O_uFHnQlKrmjChcn-yoV1F72p1L23AlZoEuwPAZ9OD9e7Lj5KKb0GaYJRpAoSu3fREKOpykmxXD6kdXXkiCtnyBYIDn92IkhZx7QPOrd4zrV-_FHCa855jKZkGCwSS-rBLYjdWGQl7AQGYZ14K8eXsfGS46YYC0KOy0x-MKVBxVPaDt-cR0G3QT-RnY1P-_6FWKJcxmXHzUAhBc2c__BFTDDaqV6wx7yr6ZnTM3jWwKxBzqGn8EdMfjA_6qJlvSFAzuIgCqzw-TS7J8iwP3TKi85L3HoESVyxyXCVap6SZwxUW2mdk1UnVNGd8mFF_pyVfFMscn7iliil_clNEAbcARdjf35eYTtu0N78y9-pk-yjwrjOz5lQwQfw%3D)
If ever there were a time to invest in our campaign, it's now.

**[I hope we can count on your generosity at the time we need it the most.](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=aee118d0f8134c4ba66aa7a1b9d06734&_e=1X63nNwxaBbQI_gOTnIbccVEznlTo0KUkAaGsGjYcKKi3z5vH7IItlIjeNnyv-KwCwe8SEBPq6b3K-6PnarpQz5h2oT6Q3iXeZlwlsZm9kE1LU0uQ0O_uFHnQlKrmjChcn-yoV1F72p1L23AlZoEuwPAZ9OD9e7Lj5KKb0GaYJRpAoSu3fREKOpykmxXD6kdXXkiCtnyBYIDn92IkhZx7QPOrd4zrV-_FHCa855jKZkGCwSS-rBLYjdWGQl7AQGYZ14K8eXsfGS46YYC0KOy0x-MKVBxVPaDt-cR0G3QT-RnY1P-_6FWKJcxmXHzUAhBc2c__BFTDDaqV6wx7yr6Zt-S5d6HsKVvRMU14e6St3ttJIlIQWTLc1DjNs3HWeMWJLJuXOQNUYH9TmqVhUpJgTu-HfHRy_oYg1RX1VI2dFBFR9AKPCkz-Ar-FyBNzBzqckMr2k7a60zCwUnMbr55HY-aVo4rlyv7FzeonsWKfjQ%3D)**

clean_body: I need to know if you’re with me before this critical deadline – just a few hours away. | Friend, Tonight is our FINAL monthly fundraising deadline before the runoff election, so I am reaching out for your help. Friend, we've been outraised ... by a lot ... again. Senator Raphael Warnock has raised far more money than any other candidate in the country, and he's spending at a rate we've never seen before – mostly on false attack ads against me! It's no secret that National Democrats are HEAVILY invested in helping Senator Warnock. He's a reliable vote for Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. That's why they are rewarding him with MILLIONS of dollars. We've got to pick up the pace before tonight's deadline, and we can only do that with the help of folks just like you. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: Don't let the Left buy this seat, again. Herschel Walker P.S. The race is tied, early voting turnout is off-the-charts, and tonight's end-of-month deadline is critical. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

We are SO close! | Y'all- This is amazing. We are looking at the numbers coming in and after we reported, a generous donor has said **they would match everything coming in for the rest of the day to help our canvassers get housing down in Georgia.** This means big things for this next week. We already phone banked with Senator Warnock this week and we have hundreds of volunteers going down to knock in Georgia this weekend. We are all in on Georgia so we can get 51 seats in the Senate. Folks- We have been hard at work organizing weekly canvasses, phone banks and town halls to ensure that young voters are ready and prepared to vote in this December 6th runoff election. Why? Because we know that Herschel Walker is not prepared, he is not fit and he is not ready to serve young Georgians in the United States Senate. Whether it be his election denialism, climate denialism or his extremism on a woman’s right to have an abortion, he has proven he is not who we need in the Senate. Young Georgians NEED Reverend Warnock. But unfortunately this race is going to be close, our organizers are working day in and day out to bring victory to this state but we rely on supporters like you. clean_body: We are SO close! | Y'all- This is amazing. We are looking at the numbers coming in and after we reported, a generous donor has said they would match everything coming in for the rest of the day to help our canvassers get housing down in Georgia. This means big things for this next week. We already phone banked with Senator Warnock this week and we have hundreds of volunteers going down to knock in Georgia this weekend. We are all in on Georgia so we can get 51 seats in the Senate. Democratically yours, YDA Finance -\--------- Forwarded message --------- From: YDA 4 GA <info@yda.org> Date: November 30, 2022 at 12:20 PM EDT Subject: FW: DEADLINE TONIGHT: You still have time to help! | Folks- We have been hard at work organizing weekly canvasses, phone banks and town halls to ensure that young voters are ready and prepared to vote in this December 6th runoff election. Why? Because we know that Herschel Walker is not prepared, he is not fit and he is not ready to serve young Georgians in the United States Senate. Whether it be his election denialism, climate denialism or his extremism on a woman’s right to have an abortion, he has proven he is not who we need in the Senate. Young Georgians NEED Reverend Warnock. But unfortunately this race is going to be close, our organizers are working day in and day out to bring victory to this state but we rely on supporters like you. ** YDA is taking the leap and paying for a bunch of Young Democrats to go canvass to door knock for Warnock and fight for the 51st seat in the Senate. We need to show everyone that we don’t need a Walker. We need a Runner. Onward, YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: Giffords.org
subject: LAST CALL: our midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is lifesaving work. It’s work we do daily. But we cannot do it alone. So please:
#

Friends -
If everyone getting this email contributed even $5 before our midnight November fundraising deadline, we would reach our goals and have the resources we need to be ready for the lame duck AND the new Congress.
But not everyone gives.
That’s why we need people like you—people who care—to contribute before this deadline ends.
$5.
$5 to help us fund our work passing gun safety laws in states across the country.
$5 to help us stop the NRA from passing dangerous gun laws in other states.
$5 to help us continue our federal progress on gun safety laws in Congress.
This is lifesaving work. It’s work we do daily. But we cannot do it alone. So please:
[**Can you contribute $5, or whatever you can afford today, to help Giffords PAC reach our fundraising goals before tonight’s midnight deadline ends for us? | Peter – I'm fired up!

Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.**

**That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.

[So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between me and UniteDemocrats to help us hit our final end-of-month goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue? »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55347781/381472486/-1345694891?amount=10&refcode=UD_20221130_EMSPL_E4_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmZTBjODc5LTEzNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tAmeOpubAqIB1rxfLxD1dPBxBX7W_iGdRuSqiOxNydQ=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55347787/381472492/-1345694891?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20221130_EMSPL_E4_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmZTBjODc5LTEzNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tAmeOpubAqIB1rxfLxD1dPBxBX7W_iGdRuSqiOxNydQ=)

With just six days to go until the runoff election, national Republicans are going all in to flip Georgia and this Senate seat red.
**Mitch McConnell's super PAC is launching nasty attack ads to smear me on the airwaves – and GOP donors have poured _$58 million_ into Walker's campaign to defeat me. If we don't fight back ASAP, I'm worried we could be outspent and drowned out right as Georgians are voting.**
General election results showed us narrowly ahead of Walker, so I know we can beat the odds and win. But we need to hit every single fundraising goal between now and the runoff election to make it happen, starting with this one.

**[So please, friend, will you rush $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before our very last end-of-month deadline – so we can win in Georgia and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55348465/381476268/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5123-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzdhNzkyYS0xNDcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwksdS7VkQLLtM6T4Wp09mls8tv5mK5kTxp9eUpdiEE=)**

Fellow American,

Tonight is our FINAL monthly fundraising deadline before the runoff election, so I am reaching out for your help. **[I hope you'll take just 19 seconds to watch:](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=20371f69041545b59360f7d790d1f9a7&_e=lxkdCNeEdXaTGh2oF9SatXJXnIz1t-rIDrE67Ap_GSonhbNnsd51ro1VDUQFLCgmhHrD3PqmyWAA7eHAVE6A4P52u1ETWI5lCcx3Ey1OW7_1J54Oj8q-1JwSfppaGIP4bDmwVkh17SgfuJdc1-Fv1yrf6UCzw3bVOm2EmjNDPkRPuudGuhdBlfhelvzh8x-1QEf0bSJNL1GvPa3PhO2P6ddr8ksLBkG_6oqVpHQnNEKlyY5wqMIt0ruF7T7d1Mzcy1apjtYCEYiiHqQRknX86Re53Cxx_mBlULjqYRXF2Z1R3gRTv0JtLtElCHxyaDc_tu7w3RGCjt1FXe-XoKkCeUJr1zthoqQJStI8SyBy3eoBNi4mEj9QCLUGPhPzrGSEcVjiz12Jpeoxwx36GdlGWUbadzqI4ogvLAZTIJfDT7YbNd7WqbmHBzxBXFlI5s0k)**

Fellow American, we've been outraised ... by a lot ... again.

Senator Raphael Warnock has raised far more money than any other candidate in the country, and he's spending at a rate we've never seen before - mostly on false attack ads against me!

It's no secret that National Democrats are HEAVILY invested in helping Senator Warnock. He's a reliable vote for Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. That's why they are rewarding him with MILLIONS of dollars.

We've got to pick up the pace before tonight's deadline, and we can only do that with the help of folks just like you.

**[Fellow American, will you please help me before November is over?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=20371f69041545b59360f7d790d1f9a7&_e=lxkdCNeEdXaTGh2oF9SatXJXnIz1t-rIDrE67Ap_GSonhbNnsd51ro1VDUQFLCgmhHrD3PqmyWAA7eHAVE6A4P52u1ETWI5lCcx3Ey1OW7_1J54Oj8q-1JwSfppaGIP4bDmwVkh17SgfuJdc1-Fv1yrf6UCzw3bVOm2EmjNDPkRPuudGuhdBlfhelvzh8x-1QEf0bSJNL1GvPa3PhO2P6ddr8ksLBkG_6oqVpHQnNEKlyY5wqMIt0ruF7T7d1Mzcy1apjtYCEYiiHqQRknX86Re53Cxx_mBlULjqYRXF2Z2Tvj6x-T9j2EMP_do1av-JpOz4pwSvTa-fFQx_3cnGA7MDq9RYHdFOPqr5MUJ6htrM9mDIioseJz7KPtu-tFJZX4_6cgGX8fYhKL3VlnKZO47s2EK_30RC8LfivNZv8_DgcMJG8fkmhLIyKe1UuhbU)**

clean_body: I need to know if you’re with me before this critical deadline – just a few hours away. | Fellow American, Tonight is our FINAL monthly fundraising deadline before the runoff election, so I am reaching out for your help. Fellow American, we've been outraised ... by a lot ... again. Senator Raphael Warnock has raised far more money than any other candidate in the country, and he's spending at a rate we've never seen before - mostly on false attack ads against me! It's no secret that National Democrats are HEAVILY invested in helping Senator Warnock. He's a reliable vote for Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. That's why they are rewarding him with MILLIONS of dollars. We've got to pick up the pace before tonight's deadline, and we can only do that with the help of folks just like you. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: Don't let the Left buy this seat, again. Herschel Walker P.S. The race is tied, early voting turnout is off-the-charts, and tonight's end-of-month deadline is critical. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Not part of our original plan
body:
#
Peter,
We weren’t planning on emailing you again but since we’re so close to reaching our goal we wanted to reach out one more time before midnight.
Reaching our November fundraising goal will help us continue to build the infrastructure to recruit more primary challengers and go up against the entire political establishment — including right-wing super PACs like AIPAC.
[**If you can afford it, please make a donation right now to help us reach our goal before midnight. Your contribution could put us over the top.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122187?refcode=em20221130-26330&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26330%2E1203867%2Ebh3JDi)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122187?refcode=em20221130-26330&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26330%2E1203867%2Ebh3JDi)**
[****](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122187?refcode=em20221130-26330&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26330%2E1203867%2Ebh3JDi)
Thank you so much for everything that you’re doing to push our movement for progress forward. We truly rely on grassroots support.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=26330%2E1203867%2Ebh3JDi) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=26330%2E1203867%2Ebh3JDi) and your state public health department.

clean_body: Peter, We weren’t planning on emailing you again but since we’re so close to reaching our goal we wanted to reach out one more time before midnight. Reaching our November fundraising goal will help us continue to build the infrastructure to recruit more primary challengers and go up against the entire political establishment — including right-wing super PACs like AIPAC. Thank you so much for everything that you’re doing to push our movement for progress forward. We truly rely on grassroots support. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. JusticeDemocrats.com 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Georgians are heading to the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker.

| Peter – I'm fired up!

Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.**

**That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.

[_**So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Fight for Progress to help us hit our final end-of-month goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55358706/381485026/1635673157?refcode=BLU-FFP-20221130-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MWM3N2E0LTFkNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5MlJmMgzx283f-KZ3iAi1JIcbCTH-oydyxv2mfM7jxU=)

clean_body: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. | Peter – I'm fired up! Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls. That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win. But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal. = | | | = | = | = | = | = I'm deeply appreciative of you – today and every day. Let's go win this thing! – Rev. Raphael Warnock * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. I wanted to take this opportunity to say I hear you, and I am determined to tackle those issues head-on. Friend, here are some of my priorities for the coming Congress.
* Hold drug traffickers accountable for fueling the tragic fentanyl crisis that is destroying an entire generation
* Hold Washington and the government accountable and make sure our government isn’t withholding information we deserve to know
* Counter the crippling inflation by stopping the out-of-control government spending

I will never stop fighting to protect our families and defend our values. I’m proud of the work we’ve been able to do over the past two years, but I know there is plenty more to do. So let's roll up our sleeves and make the next two years just as beneficial! Are you with me?

clean_body: I need to know if you’re with me before this critical deadline – just a few hours away. | Friend, Tonight is our FINAL monthly fundraising deadline before the runoff election, so I am reaching out for your help. Friend, we've been outraised ... by a lot ... again. Senator Raphael Warnock has raised far more money than any other candidate in the country, and he's spending at a rate we've never seen before – mostly on false attack ads against me! It's no secret that National Democrats are HEAVILY invested in helping Senator Warnock. He's a reliable vote for Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. That's why they are rewarding him with MILLIONS of dollars. We've got to pick up the pace before tonight's deadline, and we can only do that with the help of folks just like you. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: Don't let the Left buy this seat, again. Herschel Walker P.S. The race is tied, early voting turnout is off-the-charts, and tonight's end-of-month deadline is critical. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We can make up the difference, but we’re running out of time.
#
Peter,
Before 11:59 PM, I wanted to send you an update on our campaign’s finances and why we set a goal to raise $50,000 by the end of November.
**First, here’s some good news:** Grassroots supporters from across the country are chipping in to Pramila’s campaign to strengthen our progressive movement. Every donation sends a message: Whenever working people come together, we can achieve powerful things.
**But, here’s the not-so-good news:** We have less than 6 hours left, and we’re still short of reaching our $50,000 end-of-month goal.
We know we can raise this money and close the gap, **but we’re running out of time.** We don’t have big corporate donors or billionaires to sweep in with a last-minute high-dollar donation. We rely on folks like you, Peter, giving contributions of $3, $15, $27 or whatever you can.
[**So Peter, we know we can bridge this gap with your help. Will you donate what you can so we can reach our goal of $50,000 before midnight tonight?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23981?refcode=em20221130-1907&t=1&akid=1907%2E420207%2EYMdc5p)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23981?refcode=em20221130-1907&t=20&akid=1907%2E420207%2EYMdc5p)**
In solidarity,
Lauren Lalonde

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221130-1907-footer&t=21&refcode2=1907_420207_YMdc5p&akid=1907%2E420207%2EYMdc5p)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=1907%2E420207%2EYMdc5p)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=1907%2E420207%2EYMdc5p)

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| Hi Friend, I'm excited to share that Country First just released our very first limited edition Christmas ornament. When the team started developing it, I figured it would be cool, but wasn't prepared for how awesome this 3-D model of my plane would be. The real one is missing the logo -- perhaps that's a project for 2023? [](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRNj_hm5IDZcMUMjFNESB0mLgiY0GMTJYAfHKNex7gWfP&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ornament_nd&n=1) You can check it out here: [https://shop.country1st.com/products/ornament](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRNj_hm5IDZcMUMjFNESB0mLgiY0GMTJYAfHKNex7gWfP&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ornament_nd&n=2) The price of the ornament reflects the high-quality artistry and craftsmanship that went into this. I'm confident you'll enjoy having some pro-democracy on your tree every year. What do you think of our 2022 ornament? We've also got some [new holiday items](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRHcpXYfjxjxBeZ437P2WI-DIewPMQtVeYNK6MIJrdfO5AHjaH_YZyDIXQ68AQP8ouQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ornament_nd&n=3) in the shop, with even more coming soon. You can check them out [here](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRHcpXYfjxjxBeZ437P2WI-DIewPMQtVeYNK6MIJrdfO5AHjaH_YZyDIXQ68AQP8ouQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ornament_nd&n=4). Hope you can find at least one you like! All proceeds go toward fueling our movement and the defense of democracy. Country First, Adam | Paid for by Country First
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori?=
subject: I just got back from a week in Washington
body:
Let me know what you think. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/771f325070dc/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7982587?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=29bc8d373b&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

I wanted to touch base.

After returning from my week in Washington D.C., I felt it was necessary to get your opinion.

There are a lot of issues facing us not only domestically but internationally. That is why I want to prioritize what is most important to my constituents.

Can you take a moment and let me know what issue matters most to you?

Thanks,

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
[_**CONGRESSIONAL ISSUE SURVEY**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=d9660ff835&e=c87c5d8d97)
1) What issue is most important to you?
a) The Economy
b) Energy Production
c) National Security
d) Infringement of your rights
e) The Russia/Ukraine Conflict
f) All of the above

clean_body: Let me know what you think. | | | | | | | Peter, I wanted to touch base. After returning from my week in Washington D.C., I felt it was necessary to get your opinion. There are a lot of issues facing us not only domestically but internationally. That is why I want to prioritize what is most important to my constituents. Can you take a moment and let me know what issue matters most to you? Thanks, Lori Chavez-DeRemer 1) What issue is most important to you? a) The Economy b) Energy Production c) National Security d) Infringement of your rights e) The Russia/Ukraine Conflict f) All of the above | "SUBMIT MY RESPONSE" | | | **** | |

Derek- We wanted to get in front of you again one more time before midnight. We are looking at the numbers coming in and after we reported, a generous donor has said they would match everything coming in for the rest of the day to help our canvassers get housing down in Georgia. But we can still do more! We have 5 reasons why you should give $50 or more right now: 🍑 A 51-49 Senate means no power sharing agreement with the Republicans and means we have full control of the committees. 🍑 It means fewer arbitrary tie breaking votes having to be made by the Vice President. 🍑 It also means we won't have to rely so heavily on a certain duo from West Virginia and Arizona every vote. 🍑 Herschel Walker goes back to his home in Texas. 🍑 It'll make Mitch McConnell very sad. Seems like a pretty good deal to us! [Your money now means votes and big things for this next week. We already phone banked with Senator Warnock this week and we have hundreds of volunteers going down to knock in Georgia this weekend. We are all in on Georgia so we can get 51 seats in the Senate. clean_body: Only a few more dollars will be a big help! | | Derek- We wanted to get in front of you again one more time before midnight. We are looking at the numbers coming in and after we reported, a generous donor has said they would match everything coming in for the rest of the day to help our canvassers get housing down in Georgia. But we can still do more! We have 5 reasons why you should give $50 or more right now: 🍑 A 51-49 Senate means no power sharing agreement with the Republicans and means we have full control of the committees. 🍑 It means fewer arbitrary tie breaking votes having to be made by the Vice President. 🍑 It also means we won't have to rely so heavily on a certain duo from West Virginia and Arizona every vote. 🍑 Herschel Walker goes back to his home in Texas. 🍑 It'll make Mitch McConnell very sad. Seems like a pretty good deal to us! Onward, YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: R. Warnock
subject: one last time today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
I know it's late, friend, but I had to reach out one last time before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.
**If we're going to win this critical runoff, we need enough resources to mobilize as many voters as possible across Georgia in the next six days. But right now, we're still $8,584 short of tonight's end-of-month goal – a goal that we simply cannot afford to miss.**
**So please, friend, this is the final call, and I'm counting on you to chip in whatever you can:**[Will you please rush $5 to help us close this budget gap, keep Georgia blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55367995/381486089/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5094-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjQxZGMzZi0yNDcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tpH6nH39xuySt9HPOAjJEQOBNPK2x0QEjkzumO9qsLQ=)
I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support. Thank you.

– Rev. Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=sy%2FHzRY2En922vyN0ChNbu8dMAvY9ILjGbZcRUWqFOWTtn7dKIDloabtgzaQGmcX45IP8m8prDyza9%2FOenhJRFb%2BgE%2FmNRKF2jeLAIq8fobHNNpRrWP5lbKvRVepsmAyITBpYy1cJVD016oo7yyG65Tx3X48V%2FDzJZXMS991q5EgWq21v0skFFFOB47uSBfBkYQU79nW98Enam5%2BBO2JEYG0Exq17jVHh3Xqpudd70cK045fuW0ccJ6WavUS3FAV61aX%2Fqu8%2FMl9gUGW5PldcGchELuDXd0QR491vxoNez8RWMJdT7icEkbik2QWTe8NnKQrta%2FSw95C4oh88k28gWtQrWAwvR0AMRc8kLXPt3gw9orwyzxAohuBRwRxdpEYGvf9RG2nCVn2Q50KKKKvBlcJDcMfMhqrQ6A0y4qfAFI%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. subject: Fwd: Recount in Washington Congressional District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Keith Swank (R)
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/85b6969b0c85/re-thank-you-15954995?e=d32193ab14)
---
|
---
| | | **Recount in WA 3rd Congressional District**

**The following is an urgent message from my friend Joe Kent. I support his efforts to conduct a full recount. **

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Joe Kent** <[joe@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:joe@joekentforcongress.com)>
Date: Fri, Nov 25, 2022 at 10:44 AM
Subject: Please help fund the recount!

Here in Washington State, the election officials are still counting ballots and our campaign is still hard at work fixing many our supporter ballots that were rejected. The margin is well under 1% and shrinking fast. We are preparing to request a recount but, unfortunately, our campaign will have to pay for it. Will you help us raise the approximately $80,000 we need by donating at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=b9ebd3496b&e=d32193ab14)? We believe a recount would be worthwhile given the narrow margin, the documented technical issues in the signature verification process, human error, and the precedent of elections being overturned in our state following recounts. The maximum contribution to the recount fund is $2900 (or $5800 for married couples). Anything you can spare would help us. We have a VERY short timeline to raise the money – just a few days. Please give whatever you can afford at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=305f763f45&e=d32193ab14). Thank you and God Bless, Joe Kent PS – With the margin less than 1%, please help raise money to pay for the recount. We have just a few days to raise the money. Donate today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=7a83ce28eb&e=d32193ab14).

---
| **In Freedom, **

**Keith R. Swank |[KeithSwank.com](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=ad98cf1f3a&e=d32193ab14 "https://keithswank.com/about.html")
Police Captain | Army Airborne Infantry Veteran | GOP Candidate**

---
| [DONATE](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=417bcd2cf1&e=d32193ab14 "Anedot Donate Link")
---
| | **ABOUT: Keith Swank is a U.S. Army Airborne Infantry Veteran and Seattle Police Captain known for his expertise as a national law enforcement instructor for crisis intervention and de-escalation. He served as Night Duty Commander and Commander of the Metro Special Response Section (SWAT Team, Harbor Patrol, Canine Unit and Arson/Bomb Squad). In the U.S. Army he served in a long range reconnaissance unit and graduated from Ranger School, Airborne School, High Altitude Low Opening (HALO) and Infantry Training. Mr. Swank is a graduate of the University of Washington where he attained a degree in psychology. He is officially endorsed by a long list of respected groups and officials, to include the Pierce County and Thurston County Republican Party, SEAL PAC, Washington State Farm Bureau PAC, Ranger PAC, Veterans Vote PAC and many more.**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Recount in WA 3rd Congressional District The following is an urgent message from my friend Joe Kent. I support his efforts to conduct a full recount. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Joe Kent <mailto:joe@joekentforcongress.com> Date: Fri, Nov 25, 2022 at 10:44 AM Subject: Please help fund the recount! Here in Washington State, the election officials are still counting ballots and our campaign is still hard at work fixing many our supporter ballots that were rejected. The margin is well under 1% and shrinking fast. We are preparing to request a recount but, unfortunately, our campaign will have to pay for it. Will you help us raise the approximately $80,000 we need by donating at ? We believe a recount would be worthwhile given the narrow margin, the documented technical issues in the signature verification process, human error, and the precedent of elections being overturned in our state following recounts. The maximum contribution to the recount fund is $2900 (or $5800 for married couples). Anything you can spare would help us. We have a VERY short timeline to raise the money – just a few days. Please give whatever you can afford at . Thank you and God Bless, Joe Kent PS – With the margin less than 1%, please help raise money to pay for the recount. We have just a few days to raise the money. Donate today at . | In Freedom, Keith R. Swank | "" Police Captain | Army Airborne Infantry Veteran | GOP Candidate | "Anedot Donate Link" | | ABOUT: Keith Swank is a U.S. Army Airborne Infantry Veteran and Seattle Police Captain known for his expertise as a national law enforcement instructor for crisis intervention and de-escalation. He served as Night Duty Commander and Commander of the Metro Special Response Section (SWAT Team, Harbor Patrol, Canine Unit and Arson/Bomb Squad). In the U.S. Army he served in a long range reconnaissance unit and graduated from Ranger School, Airborne School, High Altitude Low Opening (HALO) and Infantry Training. Mr. Swank is a graduate of the University of Washington where he attained a degree in psychology. He is officially endorsed by a long list of respected groups and officials, to include the Pierce County and Thurston County Republican Party, SEAL PAC, Washington State Farm Bureau PAC, Ranger PAC, Veterans Vote PAC and many more. | "" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 | Friends of Keith Swank | All Rights Reserved Paid for by Friends of Keith Swank (R) Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA 10th District PO Box 731582, Puyallup, WA 98373 Use of official titles, rank, or photos do not imply official DoD or police department endorsement. |

name: Tom Homan
subject: We’re suing the Biden administration…
body:
Without borders and without the rule of law we have nothing.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999119:JnvC0lG2N:m:1:3253819041:5A42569CA7EE86369A1941D477BAC57F:r)

Peter,

Violent crime is climbing to rates we haven't seen since the 80s and 90s, but that's not enough for Joe Biden.

It's not enough that police are in retreat in almost every major American city...

And it's not enough that left-wing district attorneys let lifelong violent criminals roam the streets...

Now the Biden Administration is putting Americans in even MORE danger.

How? This administration is literally prohibiting immigration officers from removing illegal aliens!

**That's why the Immigration Reform Law Institute (IRLI) is representing a group of counties, sheriffs, and immigration enforcement officers in their lawsuit against the Biden Administration,**[**and why I hope I can count on your support today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999119:JnvC0lG2N:m:1:3253819041:5A42569CA7EE86369A1941D477BAC57F:r)

You see, right now aliens convicted of sexual battery on a child, domestic violence, and drunk driving have been released under the policy onto the streets and highways of America.

I don't want to live in a country where criminals run the show. But that is essentially what will happen if these dangerous polices are allowed to continue.

**Joe Biden's anti-borders immigration policies are going to transform the United States of America into a country few of us would recognize or want to live in, and one of the most powerful tools we have to stop him is that of the law.**

[**We're trying to stop them, but we can't do it without your generous support. Will you join the fight with a gift today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999119:JnvC0lG2N:m:1:3253819041:5A42569CA7EE86369A1941D477BAC57F:r)

My name is Tom Homan, and I'm the former acting director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and a Senior Fellow at IRLI.

As acting director of ICE, I saw exactly what we're up against.

I got to know all about the criminals pouring into our country.

And I can tell you that there's nothing more concerning to me than a president that won't let immigration enforcement professionals do their jobs.

That's why I'm so proud of the work that IRLI does.

Every time our legal team has taken on the Biden Administration, we've won.

And that's thanks to patriots like you.

[**If you're in the position to make a generous gift today and help make IRLI 6-0 against the Biden administration, I hope you will.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999119:JnvC0lG2N:m:1:3253819041:5A42569CA7EE86369A1941D477BAC57F:r)

Because nothing we do is possible without people like you in our corner.

We have a small group of dedicated attorneys working around the clock, sacrificing the riches and fame they'd make at other law firms, because they know that without borders, we have no America.

**And they know that America is worth fighting for.**

When they take on a case and spend hours upon hours devising legal strategy, they don't charge a dime.

They don't take the big, D.C. salaries (that they're more than qualified for) because they want to make every dollar donated stretch as far as it can for their clients, cases, and country.

But we still need dollars to stretch.

These legal battles are no small undertaking, and to put things plainly, we can't win them without the funds. **That's why we are trying to raise $100,000 more dollars in the next FIVE DAYS to shore up our resources as we pursue this legal battle.**

Will you help us meet this goal?

We recently filed in court a request for a preliminary injunction against the Biden Administration for protecting illegal aliens from deportation, and we won't win it without you.

[**Please make a generous donation today and give our attorneys the ammunition they need.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999119:JnvC0lG2N:m:1:3253819041:5A42569CA7EE86369A1941D477BAC57F:r)

This lawsuit is absolutely critical to defending our borders and making sure the Biden Administration can't turn our nation into a lawless free-for-all.

Your support means the world to us, and to your country.

Sincerely,

Tom Homan
Former Acting Director of the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement,
Senior Fellow at Immigration Reform Law Institute

[ >> DONATE << ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999119:JnvC0lG2N:m:1:3253819041:5A42569CA7EE86369A1941D477BAC57F:r)

[**We're trying to stop them, but we can't do it without your generous support. Will you join the fight with a gift today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999129:JYO70lGYN:m:1:3317145305:67A4A04B7493983C00437BCB3E381EA7:r)

My name is Tom Homan, and I'm the former acting director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and a Senior Fellow at IRLI.

As acting director of ICE, I saw exactly what we're up against.

I got to know all about the criminals pouring into our country.

And I can tell you that there's nothing more concerning to me than a president that won't let immigration enforcement professionals do their jobs.

That's why I'm so proud of the work that IRLI does.

Every time our legal team has taken on the Biden Administration, we've won.

And that's thanks to patriots like you.

[**If you're in the position to make a generous gift today and help make IRLI 6-0 against the Biden administration, I hope you will.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999129:JYO70lGYN:m:1:3317145305:67A4A04B7493983C00437BCB3E381EA7:r)

Because nothing we do is possible without people like you in our corner.

We have a small group of dedicated attorneys working around the clock, sacrificing the riches and fame they'd make at other law firms, because they know that without borders, we have no America.

**And they know that America is worth fighting for.**

When they take on a case and spend hours upon hours devising legal strategy, they don't charge a dime.

They don't take the big, D.C. salaries (that they're more than qualified for) because they want to make every dollar donated stretch as far as it can for their clients, cases, and country.

But we still need dollars to stretch.

These legal battles are no small undertaking, and to put things plainly, we can't win them without the funds. **That's why we are trying to raise $100,000 more dollars in the next FIVE DAYS to shore up our resources as we pursue this legal battle.**

Will you help us meet this goal?

We recently filed in court a request for a preliminary injunction against the Biden Administration for protecting illegal aliens from deportation, and we won't win it without you.

[**Please make a generous donation today and give our attorneys the ammunition they need.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999129:JYO70lGYN:m:1:3317145305:67A4A04B7493983C00437BCB3E381EA7:r)

This lawsuit is absolutely critical to defending our borders and making sure the Biden Administration can't turn our nation into a lawless free-for-all.

Your support means the world to us, and to your country.

Sincerely,

Tom Homan
Former Acting Director of the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement,
Senior Fellow at Immigration Reform Law Institute

name: Jessi Melton, Parental Rights Advocate
subject: Who’s behind the increase in kids with gender confusion?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999355:JJ-mRlGNY:m:1:3331421248:92071F0ECD765D8F6724A6805FC43207:r)
Peter,

Did you know that there has been a staggering increase in students that identify as _" gender nonconforming"_?

In the largest and most affluent public school district in Maryland, there's been **a 582% increase since last school year. . .**

During the 2019-2020 school year, 35 students told that school district that they identified as 'gender nonconforming.'

_**Now, a total of 239 students reported that they were gender nonconforming.**_

And 45% of these students considered themselves "non-binary."

The increase in LGBT kids is no coincidence. Institutional forces, like the corrupt Teachers Union, are behind this destructive movement.

And they MUST be stopped!

I'm Jessi Melton, President of the Parents Union of America (PUOA). We're working with America-First candidates and organizations to keep politicians and Federal institutions from indoctrinating our children.

[_**But we can 't do it alone. Can you show your support by donating any amount? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999355:JJ-mRlGNY:m:1:3331421248:92071F0ECD765D8F6724A6805FC43207:r)

The pressure on our children is coming from all sides.

From the White House -- _**the Biden Administration threatened to withhold lunch funding to public schools that wanted to keep bathrooms separated by biological sex.**_

From Federal entities like the Department of Health & Human Services, the Justice Department, and the Center for Disease Control (CDC) -- _**Recently, the CDC allocated $85 MILLION to pressure schools to adopt LGBT groups.**_

From hospitals and medical associations -- _**The American Medical Association has lobbied to INCREASE sex-change treatment on children in many states.**_

From school board and Teachers Unions -- _**two teachers in Spreckels, California, stalked students online during school hours to recruit them to the school 's LGBTQ+ club.**_

[_**Will you stand up for the rights of parents and keep our children from being indoctrinated?**__**All you have to do is donate today!**__**You can send your urgent gift by clicking here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999355:JJ-mRlGNY:m:1:3331421248:92071F0ECD765D8F6724A6805FC43207:r)

**Parents Union of America is fighting against the corrupt Teachers Union.**

We are a vehicle for conservative parents and teachers across the nation to systematically restore God as the foundation of our culture. And we've begun with the public education system.

Now, we're fighting to take back public schools for parents and children.

My goal is to build a grassroots network of parents and citizens from across the country who want to protect our children from this predatory movement.

**Can you help PUOA reach our goal by sending your urgent gift today? Click below.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999356:JJ-mRlGNY:m:1:3331421248:92071F0ECD765D8F6724A6805FC43207:r)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhur29qedcnfapn6of4l7ahmlr388e9255h0rk3g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ie4ob6cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjcejfnr82gt1idtptatinb1627jh628n4cvhv00_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ie4ob6cjh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgpnig0bk68g7rf59tcrku9etd49n0dcqrnrd1lg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ie4ob6cjh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo99rktd5dahj2a9plni8efihl72jm35gjlca93o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ie4ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk6u5c9fs89svpunjc650750rnal7erhpu1v8ago_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ie4ob6cjh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: Peter, Did you know that there has been a staggering increase in students that identify as " gender nonconforming"? In the largest and most affluent public school district in Maryland, there's been a 582% increase since last school year. . . During the 2019-2020 school year, 35 students told that school district that they identified as 'gender nonconforming.' Now, a total of 239 students reported that they were gender nonconforming. And 45% of these students considered themselves "non-binary." The increase in LGBT kids is no coincidence. Institutional forces, like the corrupt Teachers Union, are behind this destructive movement. And they MUST be stopped! I'm Jessi Melton, President of the Parents Union of America (PUOA). We're working with America-First candidates and organizations to keep politicians and Federal institutions from indoctrinating our children. The pressure on our children is coming from all sides. From the White House -- the Biden Administration threatened to withhold lunch funding to public schools that wanted to keep bathrooms separated by biological sex. From Federal entities like the Department of Health & Human Services, the Justice Department, and the Center for Disease Control (CDC) -- Recently, the CDC allocated $85 MILLION to pressure schools to adopt LGBT groups. From hospitals and medical associations -- The American Medical Association has lobbied to INCREASE sex-change treatment on children in many states. From school board and Teachers Unions -- two teachers in Spreckels, California, stalked students online during school hours to recruit them to the school 's LGBTQ+ club. Parents Union of America is fighting against the corrupt Teachers Union. We are a vehicle for conservative parents and teachers across the nation to systematically restore God as the foundation of our culture. And we've begun with the public education system. Now, we're fighting to take back public schools for parents and children. My goal is to build a grassroots network of parents and citizens from across the country who want to protect our children from this predatory movement. Can you help PUOA reach our goal by sending your urgent gift today? Click below. Thank you for fighting to protect our children. Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Herschel Walker

name: ICYMI News
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1juht6s36t8ehci49d86eselmi75ro008oro8gg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ie4ob6cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqvk818o231cnqcnusklk37dq4rqlo84egfhor4g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ie4ob6cdh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh823bta2oq81bf3fc8uk73ma5vc3n6c17q3mmng_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ie4ob6cdh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpfa2ljrvt87rccjqubts6d91p8otkntnn6ajk00_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3cjge9oj1cphm49fg)

subject: BREAKING: Obama’s coming back to Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

**Former President Barack Obama is coming back to stump for Senator Raphael Warnock in Georgia's Senate runoff TODAY.**

Obama's visit will create a lot of buzz and excitement with Democrat voters, so we need YOUR HELP to build our own momentum.

**[Watch a message from Herschel Walker and Lindsey Graham:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000541:6x8EglGaN:m:1:3253819041:08CC75C43672AD3F5A8EFBFF422DB6F7:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000541:6x8EglGaN:m:1:3253819041:08CC75C43672AD3F5A8EFBFF422DB6F7:r)

**We will beat Obama.
We will beat Warnock.
We will save America!**
But we cannot do these things without your help. **[Will you help us raise an additional $10,000 before the Obama rally with Raphael Warnock tonight?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000541:6x8EglGaN:m:1:3253819041:08CC75C43672AD3F5A8EFBFF422DB6F7:r)**

**[Every little bit helps. We must show Barack Obama, Raphael Warnock, and the Democrats we have the ground game to win.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000541:6x8EglGaN:m:1:3253819041:08CC75C43672AD3F5A8EFBFF422DB6F7:r)**

Thanks,

Team Herschel

P.S. Last time President Obama was in Georgia, he rallied 7,000 voters and got wall-to-wall tv coverage for Raphael Warnock in the final days of the General Election. Now he's looking to have a bigger impact in the runoff. **[Please help us fund our ground game by chipping RIGHT NOW before it's too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000541:6x8EglGaN:m:1:3253819041:08CC75C43672AD3F5A8EFBFF422DB6F7:r)**

|

Peter,

**Former President Barack Obama is coming back to stump for Senator Raphael Warnock in Georgia's Senate runoff TODAY.**

Obama's visit will create a lot of buzz and excitement with Democrat voters, so we need YOUR HELP to build our own momentum.

We will beat Warnock.
We will save America!**
But we cannot do these things without your help. **[Will you help us raise an additional $10,000 before the Obama rally with Raphael Warnock tonight?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000801:J3rZglGN7:m:1:3317145305:9F5B406A0F6C291B18A14F2AC0DAC207:r)**

Thanks,

Team Herschel

Now he's looking to have a bigger impact in the runoff. **[Please help us fund our ground game by chipping in RIGHT NOW before it's too late.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000801:J3rZglGN7:m:1:3317145305:9F5B406A0F6C291B18A14F2AC0DAC207:r)**

name: American Action News
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgl71h9idr61el8omsc4tl4n8m11e4tlgrs8eh7g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ieeo74c1h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z75l4a9jovppgu01sp6fp66aa64vhdda2ec3karo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ieeo74c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zapoi1q1qkpvu77n0m64mk94snvdurges576oc60_rp22sh2s8i66or4s3ieeo74c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000721:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 5 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in to help us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000721:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000722:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000723:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000724:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000725:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000725:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000725:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000725:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000726:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000727:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000728:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000729:J2uzj2GNe:m:1:3331421248:D23CFE50902709A5860D7DDC74B36CA7:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999895:JM4_j2G4N:m:1:3346849603:8B90E84AAEE60E9D8A720E66651CEED9:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999895:JM4_j2G4N:m:1:3346849603:8B90E84AAEE60E9D8A720E66651CEED9:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999895:JM4_j2G4N:m:1:3346849603:8B90E84AAEE60E9D8A720E66651CEED9:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999895:JM4_j2G4N:m:1:3346849603:8B90E84AAEE60E9D8A720E66651CEED9:r)**

subject: I know you’re tired, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000759:JidpN2GRN:m:1:3317145305:343270976A1DF66248E9EB9EA68D376A:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 5 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000759:JidpN2GRN:m:1:3317145305:343270976A1DF66248E9EB9EA68D376A:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000760:JidpN2GRN:m:1:3317145305:343270976A1DF66248E9EB9EA68D376A:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000761:JidpN2GRN:m:1:3317145305:343270976A1DF66248E9EB9EA68D376A:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000762:JidpN2GRN:m:1:3317145305:343270976A1DF66248E9EB9EA68D376A:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000759:JidpN2GRN:m:1:3317145305:343270976A1DF66248E9EB9EA68D376A:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000759:JidpN2GRN:m:1:3317145305:343270976A1DF66248E9EB9EA68D376A:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000759:JidpN2GRN:m:1:3317145305:343270976A1DF66248E9EB9EA68D376A:r)

Herschel Walker

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999929:6pEPQ2GNY:m:1:3350876382:5A7CBE4AA5D526A4E2128DC0F0EDC8CD:r)**_

[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999930:6pEPQ2GNY:m:1:3350876382:5A7CBE4AA5D526A4E2128DC0F0EDC8CD:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999929:6pEPQ2GNY:m:1:3350876382:5A7CBE4AA5D526A4E2128DC0F0EDC8CD:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999929:6pEPQ2GNY:m:1:3350876382:5A7CBE4AA5D526A4E2128DC0F0EDC8CD:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61999929:6pEPQ2GNY:m:1:3350876382:5A7CBE4AA5D526A4E2128DC0F0EDC8CD:r)**

body:
Hello!
First of all...
Thank you so much for all the incredible support you shown for our Conservative movement. It’s because of Patriots like you we won back control of the House, broke up united Democrat control of Washington, and built a Republican FIREWALL in Congress.
_None of this would be possible without your hard work._
Now that we’re back in charge, top Republicans like our next Majority Leader, Steve Scalise, want to make 100% sure he knows what your top priorities are heading into the new year. He wants to fight for what’s important to you -- that’s why I’m personally reaching out.
[**If there’s anything we’re missing in our priorities list, PLEASE make sure to add your answer in:**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41307%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HojlwnhJg4ymk8LOnzS7Wg&sysid=1)
**2023 GOP PRIORITIES**
**SECURE OUR BORDER
ROOT OUT PARTISAN BIAS IN THE FBI
EXPOSE DEMOCRAT CORRUPTION
PRESERVE THE LIVES OF UNBORN CHILDREN
DEFEND RELIGIOUS LIBERTY
STOP CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN OUR SCHOOLS
LOWER TAXES FOR THE AMERICAN PEOPLE
REBUILD AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE
DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY **
******[ENDORSE THIS LIST OF PRIORITIES](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41308%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YcflOqpPpmmwLn32HeRJDQ&sysid=1)**
******[ADD ANOTHER ANSWER](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41309%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tZZL8zaxNwZaOgp2w%2bjqUg&sysid=1)**
**If you don’t see your top priority listed,[please let GOP leaders know right here and right now!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41300%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uq%2bv%2finezVm3JqanoQo7iw&sysid=1)**
**If you agree with these top priorities,[please endorse this list of endorsements here!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41301%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zoJB8bpcvuDPGWmI%2flaeQw&sysid=1)**
We need your feedback before GOP leaders meet at 9:00 AM (EST) tomorrow. We value your feedback because we know our network of grassroots supporters is the lifeblood of our Conservative movement. _We can’t save America without you!_
Thank you,
Sarah
Republican HQ

None of this would be possible without your hard work. Now that we’re back in charge, top Republicans like our next Majority Leader, Steve Scalise, want to make 100% sure he knows what your top priorities are heading into the new year. He wants to fight for what’s important to you -- that’s why I’m personally reaching out. 2023 GOP PRIORITIES SECURE OUR BORDER ROOT OUT PARTISAN BIAS IN THE FBI EXPOSE DEMOCRAT CORRUPTION PRESERVE THE LIVES OF UNBORN CHILDREN DEFEND RELIGIOUS LIBERTY STOP CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN OUR SCHOOLS LOWER TAXES FOR THE AMERICAN PEOPLE REBUILD AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY **** **** If you don’t see your top priority listed, If you agree with these top priorities, We need your feedback before GOP leaders meet at 9:00 AM (EST) tomorrow. We value your feedback because we know our network of grassroots supporters is the lifeblood of our Conservative movement. We can’t save America without you! Thank you, Sarah Republican HQ Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without “green cards,” and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. 320 First Street SE Washington, DC 20003 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Kat Cammack
subject: It’s the last month of 2022!
body:
2022 is nearly over, and now that we’re in the last month of the year, I wanted to recap all that we’ve achieved.
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1gShfM3EJqwdQAxIHu-kbwMPTkS_2wcfLO4HdCId9BGKi4A-d00Pac2JWhwzRL3z3HkcHcj9aLnCGfqbdGNfsdhU2AD7wKuuwKQkOzir6sJBUMA1tOqD4IoeZsRSjbfmE_VXxhfsXcCaeAUUH7Iremoi0LhOjGq6vcP7OpkhProYBW60jysWcQmkxBxkpEj7x6Afcqa90b-c4Upp0gbig==&c=_K5Tb-ZXB4b7_191M6ZUzCNs6UcpmRfplesNO7PwYTYnwfOBGO6smA==&ch=86ltSfe5hrA16DFInpx4y_Dt3uUlFcMuaUFb3F16A-bIuTP1G9U_0A==)
---
| Friend
2022 is nearly over, and now that we're in the last month of the year, I wanted to recap all that we've achieved.
The start of the year was rough. Biden rolled out his spending plan, and seemingly overnight, prices were driven to new highs. Our nation struggled to afford daily staples like groceries and gasoline, all while being battered by violent crime and an unsecured border. We even experienced an unprecedented baby formula shortage.
Americans faced off against some of the worst crises in modern history, but we didn't cave. We came back, re-took the House, and ensured that America would no longer be put last!
---
| | [FINISH 2022 STRONG](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1gShfM3EJqwdQAxIHu-kbwMPTkS_2wcfLO4HdCId9BGKi4A-d00Pac2JWhwzRL3z3HkcHcj9aLnCGfqbdGNfsdhU2AD7wKuuwKQkOzir6sJBUMA1tOqD4IoeZsRSjbfmE_VXxhfsXcCaeAUUH7Iremoi0LhOjGq6vcP7OpkhProYBW60jysWcQmkxBxkpEj7x6Afcqa90b-c4Upp0gbig==&c=_K5Tb-ZXB4b7_191M6ZUzCNs6UcpmRfplesNO7PwYTYnwfOBGO6smA==&ch=86ltSfe5hrA16DFInpx4y_Dt3uUlFcMuaUFb3F16A-bIuTP1G9U_0A==)
---

We finally have the chance to end the crises and get America back on track.
