name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6429%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=cp4VHGzPcCxqYTd%2fWFzU7g&sysid=1)
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84458%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=acFwg1UZqudBC8LLKUAAxA&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84459%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zn4DVIYKp%2f12JF53zImiEQ&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84450%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QQd5yBxECciQ4yt0V0fKTw&sysid=1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84451%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oh%2bmx%2bbIVQNYmkxRYvGstQ&sysid=1)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84452%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dKdU98BsdD434G%2bE06zcjw&sysid=1)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84453%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S4%2fL%2bEloxKd4kbXInxHPSA&sysid=1)
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqfuuf18tt3tptku4bj7vu37p233pjikulk4pld0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziu3ml2aadkkho61v5d33rrjj55cj3j3d0h8tgfo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cdh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsgfb6a64gmol8ivps6vekdneq93h6tkaf4nd0hg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cdh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjt93fpa5m17l87s424l8cvro21gvmp05kfpao18_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cdh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuvasvcbrufsvui4kv7eb6ja3fa8u8638otovv0g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cdh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

I've got some exciting news.

I'm releasing a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

My new book, **" Never Give An Inch,"** contains untold stories you don't want to miss.

**My negotiations with Kim Jong Un, the night we took out Qasem Soleimani, my work rescuing American hostages, and much, much more are _ALL_ detailed in my new book.**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: These kids want to celebrate America
body:
THOUSANDS of patriotic young people are already eager to attend Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST this year -- and I don't want to
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk4n4rvnjjic57043kjkds9ucjr939oubsvt45v8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, THOUSANDS of patriotic young people are already eager to attend Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST this year -- and I don't want to have to turn away ANY of them!
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znvt0i5e9felffdn3ti7vn78a618rfrf1dgeubj8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
**With support from grassroots patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST can be the TIPPING POINT in our efforts to make kids love America again and WIN the American Culture War.** _That's why the Turning Point USA team and I are working to bring AS MANY students AS POSSIBLE to this year's AmericaFest!_ [**Will you help sponsor a Conservative student to attend AmericaFest this year? A gift of $50 will help sponsor ONE MORE STUDENT to attend AmericaFest ... a gift of $100 will help sponsor TWO MORE STUDENTS ... and the more you give, the more students you can support.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu287aq177mk74gsusm9r0jo26r85q3mj7kmdup0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
[Sponsor 1 student ($50)](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo6idl6u7vtlskkr4sf8rbvfs2ktvtmi2vn69f68_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
[Sponsor 2 students ($100)](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zloi255p5b9q9559kci3tu40809n2gcnrnf70fd8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
[Sponsor 3 students ($150)](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4prts711prgcq5sjvug7eb1rl3f57jpng4j2568_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
[Help sponsor for any amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8d2pt3t6c1qe0rkmcpnsko94r4gjpdvpnpus8f0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvtjvvi678vg8shb87gi9g2vbnck1977jfsbe6fo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
**AMERICAFEST is the best celebration of America you'll see all year.** It's an energizing, empowering, and exhilarating experience for young conservatives as they close out their year and prepare to enter the next. As we approach this year's event, we have already confirmed top-shelf speakers like **Candace Owens, Tucker Carlson, Newt Gingrich, Matt Walsh,** and more to be announced soon... ... which is probably why we expect at least **_TEN THOUSAND_** young conservatives to join us for this amazing patriotic event! But with your support of the **AMERICAFEST SCHOLARSHIP FUND** , we can bring EVEN MORE young Americans to this life-changing event and help them rediscover their love for our country. [**Please make a generous gift of $50, $100, $150, or whatever you can possibly afford today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znam0gkjg34ta9u9370odlto13gj3gvd4nr3jjp0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs) **I have spent TEN YEARS criss-crossing America to speak directly with young people about American Greatness.** And I must tell you that I have never before seen: Young people SO FIRED UP with Patriotism and Love of our great Country Leftists SO FURIOUS and AFRAID of how Turning Point USA is inspiring the next generation to reject Socialism and "Woke" culture Our Pro-America Movement have such a TREMENDOUS OPPORTUNITY to make kids love America again and WIN the American Culture War FOR GOOD! _This year's AmericaFest is more important than EVER, and I want to make sure EVERY young patriot who wants to attend can join us in Arizona for the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America!_ **I hope that I can count on you to JUMP-START Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST SCHOLARSHIP FUND.** [**Please make your MOST GENEROUS gift in support of Turning Point USA's AmericaFest right now. Whether you're able to help sponsor ONE STUDENT for $50 ... TWO STUDENTS for $100 ... THREE STUDENTS for $150 ... or to contribute to this important event with another amount, YOUR SUPPORT will make a powerful difference to our success.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0k8e3ek40g23nianbiqfqno15nt3hm3gkus84i8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
[Help sponsor young Conservatives](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2mgft02udmm4pnpudqij9rerfltib4r9oq46tl8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for standing with Turning Point USA to build the NEXT GENERATION of America-loving patriots! For America,
---
| | Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
[Support Turning Point USA](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvr0hjaqjvfs7pm7qh92s2g4tb4s8brmfnmpafao_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh68oj4cjh2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colle
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zurkdae29pt5dduedca7l606fr52ruct24p1qjhg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh64p34cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbtl5tllqtmtt0fi6no3b6urvd15i2ebq3j71298_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh64p34cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvrh9vqge9d92f31jju4kbjj7h7q6lf3e74mr43g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh64p34cph2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zspp2jgmn1povbnctc3gi30ppdbcn8023q6snqe0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh64p34cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z84rts1ij05r2fbpil8qksfrni64jr8ii1a72nm0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh64p34cph2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3tdgnv0lqkulrscg1s2i1s2m9vnc94eiablo3q8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh64p34cph2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z158u019sr06ib3ai6rsjljg97g4cbbbksmt6vg0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh64p34cph2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi5ukmnbnhvngii7gt9fs2gopr61ihfj8e5itd4g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh64p34cph2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3gnejaqpia8m38v7cidtcddig4rqlpv23lu4km8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3cjie4oj4chj649fg)

When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

**AMERICAFEST is the best celebration of America you'll see all year.** It's an energizing, empowering, and exhilarating experience for young conservatives as they close out their year and prepare to enter the next. As we approach this year's event, we have already confirmed top-shelf speakers like **Candace Owens, Tucker Carlson, Newt Gingrich, Matt Walsh,** and more to be announced soon... ... which is probably why we expect at least **_TEN THOUSAND_** young conservatives to join us for this amazing patriotic event! But with your support of the **AMERICAFEST SCHOLARSHIP FUND** , we can bring EVEN MORE young Americans to this life-changing event and help them rediscover their love for our country. [**Please make a generous gift of $50, $100, $150, or whatever you can possibly afford today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41333%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fVvQovMxSfhTHNrGCqYSRg&sysid=1) **I have spent TEN YEARS criss-crossing America to speak directly with young people about American Greatness.** And I must tell you that I have never before seen: Young people SO FIRED UP with Patriotism and Love of our great Country Leftists SO FURIOUS and AFRAID of how Turning Point USA is inspiring the next generation to reject Socialism and "Woke" culture Our Pro-America Movement have such a TREMENDOUS OPPORTUNITY to make kids love America again and WIN the American Culture War FOR GOOD! _This year's AmericaFest is more important than EVER, and I want to make sure EVERY young patriot who wants to attend can join us in Arizona for the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America!_ **I hope that I can count on you to JUMP-START Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST SCHOLARSHIP FUND.** [**Please make your MOST GENEROUS gift in support of Turning Point USA's AmericaFest right now. Whether you're able to help sponsor ONE STUDENT for $50 ... TWO STUDENTS for $100 ... THREE STUDENTS for $150 ... or to contribute to this important event with another amount, YOUR SUPPORT will make a powerful difference to our success.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41334%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X984648cVXGGh57hB8Nowg&sysid=1)

Thank YOU for standing with Turning Point USA to build the NEXT GENERATION of America-loving patriots! For America,

| | Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Jim Jordan
subject: THE last uncalled Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The Senate needs Herschel’s vote to stop Dems from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=85b69a3daa2f44e7985a074b0ae93f66&_e=2PUsm07jeeNElZh0zRrxs8xXLJORi1WiPOhm1e9JpGH-uND7aMUtWNHtfz5Hk0lJq3ySBRRKYYbmT3VV0bALynTP4KWGduq2qaaJ60JKP9fLXj7elsljtVqU6tmB_vPAi-mWd_FBIWfdTZzLmah5paAiihUl3QAVrlVaHF6fvpky8h9OvHsumS2GChcKFfRaU7f2kbrrkKMXE07DUWgCySvlrtRwNZoQhoti4DtyPoRKMYuAb916GtXXdPlsgEXZBOJi_9L-7oBHEtgvrztxPpYjlZ5Rg51To2S4G5RLp_l7yjEKzTGtk6of87EbB4-M1l0mYQvkCWMLE1bd6lu3wfBxLndhmy-4aMffMElnacNNLJtLZgsQ_NwcWJIiJ09Ni0bHK2U8LsxYuwWbcawZGHxWO0CAXHlZ7CS-Ko0_oghQLSXFW9K7S8LiGinoOeYGH3szuo3td56jj0WzvUwprQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate.

I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race.

Disclaimer: **[At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to chip-in $5 to help keep Herschel's campaign funded through December 6th.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=85b69a3daa2f44e7985a074b0ae93f66&_e=2PUsm07jeeNElZh0zRrxs8xXLJORi1WiPOhm1e9JpGH-uND7aMUtWNHtfz5Hk0lJq3ySBRRKYYbmT3VV0bALynTP4KWGduq2qaaJ60JKP9fLXj7elsljtVqU6tmB_vPAi-mWd_FBIWfdTZzLmah5paAiihUl3QAVrlVaHF6fvpky8h9OvHsumS2GChcKFfRaU7f2kbrrkKMXE07DUWgCySvlrtRwNZoQhoti4DtyPoRKMYuAb916GtXXdPlsgEXZBOJi_9L-7oBHEtgvrztxPpYjlZ5Rg51To2S4G5RLp_n1Xpe1B7maivbscxWbxIPld_HMyhaWV7IxUoWsp_HjXB4ecCF64w9XY42b6qG03nCuFdg0aUW-Vkf4SGPWxZNLyKaDsZvwpeXrPEpxC7DavAnqUTSfB_UORZXeKGJMdEx1lQVcrqcKGJSPcmcLuhlaHXFlax92XJZ5352WqW2tjA%3D%3D)** But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever.
1. **_Absences_** : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. **If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion.**
2. **_2024_** : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (**both deep red states**) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection.

[** CHIP in $5 ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=85b69a3daa2f44e7985a074b0ae93f66&_e=2PUsm07jeeNElZh0zRrxs8xXLJORi1WiPOhm1e9JpGH-uND7aMUtWNHtfz5Hk0lJq3ySBRRKYYbmT3VV0bALynTP4KWGduq2qaaJ60JKP9fLXj7elsljtVqU6tmB_vPAi-mWd_FBIWfdTZzLmah5paAiihUl3QAVrlVaHF6fvpky8h9OvHsumS2GChcKFfRaU7f2kbrrkKMXE07DUWgCySvlrtRwNZoQhoti4DtyPoRKMYuAb916GtXXdPlsgEXZBOJi_9L-7oBHEtgvrztxPpYjlZ5Rg51To2S4G5RLp_nVc95tmbcddWlasGRQ9lGPAvuFONqKi4P-W2aVmGFLbKGb8w_-VeRhTfp6iIbNwX_7lqPUTWqoQghjp2rBrEMFqk066k9oUvYnHpNT1VjrOn271K41ahc78pv90a-P-yIAjoUrJ4UDB8zSqR2heeyqLsd_AargL5kqkhGjyEnzkw%3D%3D)

3. **_Judges_** : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. **If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want.**
4. **_Federal nominations:_** With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more “level-headed” options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to.
5. **_6 years:_** If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, **it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years.** If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028.

**We simply cannot afford to lose this race.** We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in $5 today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=85b69a3daa2f44e7985a074b0ae93f66&_e=2PUsm07jeeNElZh0zRrxs8xXLJORi1WiPOhm1e9JpGH-uND7aMUtWNHtfz5Hk0lJq3ySBRRKYYbmT3VV0bALynTP4KWGduq2qaaJ60JKP9fLXj7elsljtVqU6tmB_vPAi-mWd_FBIWfdTZzLmah5paAiihUl3QAVrlVaHF6fvpky8h9OvHsumS2GChcKFfRaU7f2kbrrkKMXE07DUWgCySvlrtRwNZoQhoti4DtyPoRKMYuAb916GtXXdPlsgEXZBOJi_9L-7oBHEtgvrztxPpYjlZ5Rg51To2S4G5RLp_mXTWOyJ405CjzgPqOcU3l6gNGe7-myCOBKHxl52tOvfnugGwPiFkQnNzgN2j1FhIrReIC6euiG1QNHO4qt6V3_Kf3SXIFVxjNinhVnn-b0WYahufx4p6QScmtCiIWveg9jnSngp4fgeBWdia3ewb1fsskp5_z45n26LQndXelkVw%3D%3D)**

**I want Herschel to win.** The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great.

**[Will you do me a personal favor and contribute to Herschel's campaign today? I promised him I would do my best to raise $100,000 for him, and I hope you'll help me deliver on that promise.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=85b69a3daa2f44e7985a074b0ae93f66&_e=2PUsm07jeeNElZh0zRrxs8xXLJORi1WiPOhm1e9JpGH-uND7aMUtWNHtfz5Hk0lJq3ySBRRKYYbmT3VV0bALynTP4KWGduq2qaaJ60JKP9fLXj7elsljtVqU6tmB_vPAi-mWd_FBIWfdTZzLmah5paAiihUl3QAVrlVaHF6fvpky8h9OvHsumS2GChcKFfRaU7f2kbrrkKMXE07DUWgCySvlrtRwNZoQhoti4DtyPoRKMYuAb916GtXXdPlsgEXZBOJi_9L-7oBHEtgvrztxPpYjlZ5Rg51To2S4G5RLp_kpc5liLURwwlHX8b760smWxH8fF6Mf6uaYr3xgP1HjIDVFBgY0ItFN4mojeleooNeUzHlwh0GHR1rBJK8Z2TyRJ1bIzducFWybI1Ww1WUQ0vHjlVJN3HgOSO9DjZ8dlncXoP-GSBayp9A2rAn5Cw7NYu6ti_59zBhALkz3Z1tTxw%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=85b69a3daa2f44e7985a074b0ae93f66&_e=2PUsm07jeeNElZh0zRrxs8xXLJORi1WiPOhm1e9JpGH-uND7aMUtWNHtfz5Hk0lJq3ySBRRKYYbmT3VV0bALynTP4KWGduq2qaaJ60JKP9fLXj7elsljtVqU6tmB_vPAi-mWd_FBIWfdTZzLmah5paAiihUl3QAVrlVaHF6fvpky8h9OvHsumS2GChcKFfRaU7f2kbrrkKMXE07DUWgCySvlrtRwNZoQhoti4DtyPoRKMYuAb916GtXXdPlsgEXZBOJi_9L-7oBHEtgvrztxPpYjlZ5Rg51To2S4G5RLp_kuj6BtgtxyU_JtU7JqBdW9IcQymKx7XiScu5eIAFYQkDQN346MZ3FDq3MbS-f2STIKUQy4-h8ikU49FnvFZfKmUCr4cE0ECnDU_Witdi3nShnh2nQ4yy52H-QrhZMFeTF1M1tTWA9WZvIatXEOjEiJ7GcPkJrKNQvZ4CVu5duzsw%3D%3D)

clean_body: The Senate needs Herschel’s vote to stop Dems from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. | Fellow American, By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate. I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race. Disclaimer: But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever. 1. Absences : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion. 2. 2024 : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (both deep red states) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection. 3. Judges : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want. 4. Federal nominations: With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more “level-headed” options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to. 5. 6 years: If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years. If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028. We simply cannot afford to lose this race. We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. I want Herschel to win. The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. Thanks, Jim Jordan | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 5 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62006135:6NTo12GKN:m:1:3331421248:170836AB4D1B4B898630559DD7649AE4:r)

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62006135:6NTo12GKN:m:1:3331421248:170836AB4D1B4B898630559DD7649AE4:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: This year, for the first time in 30 years, Congress acted on gun violence. This happened largely because of Giffords. Giffords was founded because of the terrible tragedy that befell then-Rep. Gabby Giffords, who while holding a town hall meeting in her Tucson, AZ district was shot through the head and nearly died.
body:
how many more shootings
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e78baa7-162a-4a23-955c-c437042c1582/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | _I am so damn tired of seeing places like Colorado Springs or Chesapeake, VA start to trend on social media as a sick, sinking feeling starts to form in the pit of my stomach. Followed by my clicking on a story only to have my worst fears realized--we've had our latest Newtown. Tucson. Santa Barbara. Parkland. Orlando. Dayton. El Paso. Tree of Life. Fort Hood. Mandalay Bay. The list is as endless as it is heartbreaking. _ **It. Must. Stop.** **_This past year, for the first time in 30 years, Congress acted on gun violence._ **No, we didn't come close to getting everything we need. Yet, that Republicans felt pressured into addressing long-term priorities of the gun violence prevention movement--including a national gun trafficking law and closing the "boyfriend" loophole, which had allowed many violent men to continue to legally purchase firearms--was still a huge step forward. _This happened largely because of _Giffords_. _Giffords_ was founded because of the terrible tragedy that befell then-Rep. Gabby Giffords, who while holding a town hall meeting in her Tucson, AZ district was shot through the head and nearly died._ **_[The tragedy led Gabby and her husband--recently re-elected Senator Mark Kelly--to devote their lives to solving the problem of out-of-control gun violence in America, and your support today can help them take this fight to the next level, for all of us _._](https://default.salsalabs.org/T566a04fb-c01e-4ecb-87f5-e46fbbaa50e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help Gabby Giffords’ fight for sound gun laws**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d8330e7-ddaf-465a-9826-5ee1ee828c5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | _Giffords has been a leader in this fight, helping pass not just the national legislation, but guiding President Biden's many executive orders to fight gun violence and helping pass groundbreaking gun laws in states around the country from California to Virginia, Vermont to New Mexico._ **_Yet, the gun violence of the past few weeks reminds us that as much as we've done, there is still so much left to do. We shouldn't have to live in a country where we worry when our kids leave for school in the morning or we look around for the nearest exits when we walk into a mall or movie theater. It is despicable, really._** _So while this issue is on our minds--knowing it's only a matter of time until the next one and the one after that_ , unless and until we have passed universal background checks, universal red flag laws, an assault weapons ban, a high capacity magazine ban and more--[_**would you please join us this holiday season in saying ENOUGH, and giving a donation of $10, $20 or whatever you can, to Giffords as this incredible organization fights to make the lives of our families safer?**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c3994fe-6cc2-4067-9f2c-3a60e151bb14/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This holiday season let's all hope for a country free of the scourge of preventable gun violence.
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. clean_body: how many more shootings | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, | I am so damn tired of seeing places like Colorado Springs or Chesapeake, VA start to trend on social media as a sick, sinking feeling starts to form in the pit of my stomach. Followed by my clicking on a story only to have my worst fears realized--we've had our latest Newtown. Tucson. Santa Barbara. Parkland. Orlando. Dayton. El Paso. Tree of Life. Fort Hood. Mandalay Bay. The list is as endless as it is heartbreaking. It. Must. Stop. This past year, for the first time in 30 years, Congress acted on gun violence. No, we didn't come close to getting everything we need. Yet, that Republicans felt pressured into addressing long-term priorities of the gun violence prevention movement--including a national gun trafficking law and closing the "boyfriend" loophole, which had allowed many violent men to continue to legally purchase firearms--was still a huge step forward. This happened largely because of Giffords. Giffords was founded because of the terrible tragedy that befell then-Rep. Gabby Giffords, who while holding a town hall meeting in her Tucson, AZ district was shot through the head and nearly died. | | | | | | | | | Giffords has been a leader in this fight, helping pass not just the national legislation, but guiding President Biden's many executive orders to fight gun violence and helping pass groundbreaking gun laws in states around the country from California to Virginia, Vermont to New Mexico. Yet, the gun violence of the past few weeks reminds us that as much as we've done, there is still so much left to do. We shouldn't have to live in a country where we worry when our kids leave for school in the morning or we look around for the nearest exits when we walk into a mall or movie theater. It is despicable, really. So while this issue is on our minds--knowing it's only a matter of time until the next one and the one after that , unless and until we have passed universal background checks, universal red flag laws, an assault weapons ban, a high capacity magazine ban and more-- This holiday season let's all hope for a country free of the scourge of preventable gun violence. name: John Fetterman
subject: Less than one week left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
My friend Rev. Raphael Warnock’s runoff election is in less than *one week*.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221201-8151-header&t=1&akid=8151%2E434096%2EsuCaFk)
Hey Derek, it’s John again.
My friend Rev. Raphael Warnock’s runoff election is less than *one week away*.
Just like they did here in PA, Donald Trump + Mitch McConnell spent million$ trying to defeat Senator Warnock during the General Election. And during this runoff, they lined up even more shady GOP mega-donors to dump even more last-minute $$$ into Georgia.
**Your support helped us raise more than $100,000 to re-elect Rev. Warnock + keep Georgia blue this year.** But with less than 5 days until the runoff, he still urgently needs our help.
**[Will you split an emergency donation of any amount toward my friend Sen. Warnock’s campaign + ours right now? Your support can help turn out voters across GA in these crucial final days of this runoff.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221201-1?refcode=em20221201-8151&refcode2=8151_434096_suCaFk&akid=8151%2E434096%2EsuCaFk)**

Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!!
This really is the best grassroots team. 🥰
❤️ John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of PA
U.S. Senator-Elect from Pennsylvania

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3ilie6ck5aq5pqrfps90lgch5rf32ou8nrnj3ig_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh6co32c3h2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztlm49cdejo8ni83dm6b812acf791dl2jjlupp68_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh6co32c3h2bs)
---
[Get your copy](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvnp4ml585ddq24rdtc9rmqi0lto8j7h41tavvko_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh6co32c3h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4gtf7hhoj3r3e2qr9tli9oa0fiqdf24gcgb86t0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh6co32c3h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkib66o9s2l5tvmtgasd673i5bfqbhnkaaqvet80_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh6co32c3h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

That's the number of registered voters across Georgia that we need to

It's the morning after the Georgia Senate runoff. You rub the sleep out of your eyes. Brew some coffee. Look at the news to find out what happened in that race -- the one that was going to determine the final balance of power in the Senate. **[The one where you chipped in an extra $5 to help push our candidate over the finish line.](https://go.dscc.org/go/11323?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221201-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221201-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8992%2E9716520%2E14F9Hp)**

And wouldn't you know, the headlines are fantastic. We did it! Sen. Warnock won! We expanded our Senate majority. Your coffee has never tasted so great.

**But there's another way it could happen.** Morning. Coffee. News. But in this scenario, you didn't pitch in that $5. You were feeling pretty good about our chances, after all. The headlines jump out at you: "Democrats lose in Georgia. Herschel Walker unseats Raphael Warnock." Your coffee has never tasted so bitter.

You still have time to choose between these two outcomes -- but not much. We're running out of time to invest the resources that will mobilize voters -- so don't wait for tomorrow. Don't even read the rest of this email. [**Click here to chip in $5 right now -- and to sweeten the deal, the next 100 gifts will be QUADRUPLED!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11323?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221201-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221201-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8992%2E9716520%2E14F9Hp)

We've all seen the polls. Georgia is statistically tied. In races this close, _every little thing_ makes a huge difference. Every door knocked. Every call made. **And yes, every dollar given.**

But with the runoff just days away, we can't afford to wait. Your donation won't be going toward some far off future program. **It will be put to use first thing tomorrow.**

**[So please, chip in $5 or more right now. You have my word that it will be put to _good use_ and it will have an _immediate_ impact. Plus, a group of generous donors has agreed to QUADRUPLE the next 100 gifts, so the time to act really is now. Pitch in here >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11323?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221201-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221201-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8992%2E9716520%2E14F9Hp)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Can you chip in $2 to Herschel Walker today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The Senate needs Herschel’s vote to stop Dems from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=597f62494dfb49f3b6975e358034a68a&_e=54yENOWhxsMPNRIHi4D4ThNQ7sSfsvqP7iM7Azdms-snEen-6qIfGHsuJILva8Xq4EwTNuXFt12QVR5EDLET5D7HLccguQQEN6mYBNV4Bclq60nOu9uec1cZf8KXqD70_ChKBPVVsl7s_4WwI-OldwSwYo5vK3KUpWUuRBZVp_kZGDx9MVc_9O7PasR5dtSu2GqQwvCcuC4J5Son64M_6oUdj_VKMNMiASPp58f8H-XseoWb8s43IlNxovYilrDokSdk0T-9KGTt9f6efQE2cB8SmCK-WmPvjx4wfNJ1JU884XLnH_BEKOzFcXruUPm688wajdDLwi9ngu8Ux9x5g0fhCJYp4je5glJWB4gG_eHJMWeGlm6RyLir_oIDOBvfZe9QZIGsMEXDwXnwHmdds5nb3AX7cfCDz92OEK4327f8B7sCTRvuZcMA2OY3N9zN)
---
Fellow American,

By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate.

I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race.

Disclaimer: **[At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to chip-in $5 to help keep Herschel's campaign funded through December 6th.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=597f62494dfb49f3b6975e358034a68a&_e=54yENOWhxsMPNRIHi4D4ThNQ7sSfsvqP7iM7Azdms-snEen-6qIfGHsuJILva8Xq4EwTNuXFt12QVR5EDLET5D7HLccguQQEN6mYBNV4Bclq60nOu9uec1cZf8KXqD70_ChKBPVVsl7s_4WwI-OldwSwYo5vK3KUpWUuRBZVp_kZGDx9MVc_9O7PasR5dtSu2GqQwvCcuC4J5Son64M_6oUdj_VKMNMiASPp58f8H-XseoWb8s43IlNxovYilrDokSdk0T-9KGTt9f6efQE2cB8SmCK-WmPvjx4wfNJ1JU-YoeaSr4eLa6SnBWFVJNR5lIhc6k1pzhQIYpXFhoXUtJQqdhoGvL_oZf6souqqJV-8OCIdXV0Bbq81lQb50zFX36ULEOeZFuJecyAkho_YGpPZvztmS_JeVQFDzAxs8fBsd7L1iHMbbLzUBDtQnY9f)** But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever.
1. **_Absences_** : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. **If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion.**
2. **_2024_** : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (**both deep red states**) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection.

[** CHIP in $5 ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=597f62494dfb49f3b6975e358034a68a&_e=54yENOWhxsMPNRIHi4D4ThNQ7sSfsvqP7iM7Azdms-snEen-6qIfGHsuJILva8Xq4EwTNuXFt12QVR5EDLET5D7HLccguQQEN6mYBNV4Bclq60nOu9uec1cZf8KXqD70_ChKBPVVsl7s_4WwI-OldwSwYo5vK3KUpWUuRBZVp_kZGDx9MVc_9O7PasR5dtSu2GqQwvCcuC4J5Son64M_6oUdj_VKMNMiASPp58f8H-XseoWb8s43IlNxovYilrDokSdk0T-9KGTt9f6efQE2cJ5D7Y9ebuVY0toqi9z0KEztO4C0huXiHl5RIvFiHMkDdT7H7Leu6z4OGh_uMHMM5wp-68PZTjE14nA187JuyXrBBF7fsSIxlE9LE8IGuajnZZfTiqdC4tEBfKz9rbX53cnG0PgkPqEEOB5IZHJdklLEavAyf0YJQ9zTP_dt-0sJVt_aNRzdcrs09u32K3XDpA%3D%3D)

3. **_Judges_** : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. **If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want.**
4. **_Federal nominations:_** With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more “level-headed” options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to.
5. **_6 years:_** If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, **it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years.** If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028.

**We simply cannot afford to lose this race.** We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in $5 today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=597f62494dfb49f3b6975e358034a68a&_e=54yENOWhxsMPNRIHi4D4ThNQ7sSfsvqP7iM7Azdms-snEen-6qIfGHsuJILva8Xq4EwTNuXFt12QVR5EDLET5D7HLccguQQEN6mYBNV4Bclq60nOu9uec1cZf8KXqD70_ChKBPVVsl7s_4WwI-OldwSwYo5vK3KUpWUuRBZVp_kZGDx9MVc_9O7PasR5dtSu2GqQwvCcuC4J5Son64M_6oUdj_VKMNMiASPp58f8H-XseoWb8s43IlNxovYilrDokSdk0T-9KGTt9f6efQE2cB8SmCK-WmPvjx4wfNJ1JU-T5T1qKFNBO8-TRnKSij5f8I8NTFL3mQno8Ky8igmLjR2uqyyll1IqZjPQrOvcfIchXDLL8wKnOX1k89Flbvx4-VIbbifkB0hgcGg5M4F7czqs2LS48WMhfJH8_70pVyrRQx4Ge0II2q70VZDOPDoT)**

**I want Herschel to win.** The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great.

**[Will you do me a personal favor and contribute to Herschel's campaign today? I promised him I would do my best to raise $100,000 for him, and I hope you'll help me deliver on that promise.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=597f62494dfb49f3b6975e358034a68a&_e=54yENOWhxsMPNRIHi4D4ThNQ7sSfsvqP7iM7Azdms-snEen-6qIfGHsuJILva8Xq4EwTNuXFt12QVR5EDLET5D7HLccguQQEN6mYBNV4Bclq60nOu9uec1cZf8KXqD70_ChKBPVVsl7s_4WwI-OldwSwYo5vK3KUpWUuRBZVp_kZGDx9MVc_9O7PasR5dtSu2GqQwvCcuC4J5Son64M_6oUdj_VKMNMiASPp58f8H-XseoWb8s43IlNxovYilrDokSdk0T-9KGTt9f6efQE2cB8SmCK-WmPvjx4wfNJ1JU-Zv-8KNYnVdf5_rceeLQOtRAzljbTpV33Un3NyrcbK41c89eP6udbTLVm55tKWrR0TMTGwEoRqQ6H0ElmxbYjB8R07u0hvgBNSxqDDxBEBgHh38xb5zdO6bEPt1X78JOTFRflNn_RzbTJDS0uK5u_W)**

clean_body: The Senate needs Herschel’s vote to stop Dems from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. | Fellow American, By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate. I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race. Disclaimer: But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever. 1. Absences : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion. 2. 2024 : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (both deep red states) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection. 3. Judges : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want. 4. Federal nominations: With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more “level-headed” options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to. 5. 6 years: If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years. If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028. We simply cannot afford to lose this race. We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. I want Herschel to win. The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. Thanks, Jim Jordan | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000162:Jtg-y2GQN:m:1:3371220873:328926193ED0220EE3C71C3836DD4E97:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000162:Jtg-y2GQN:m:1:3371220873:328926193ED0220EE3C71C3836DD4E97:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000162:Jtg-y2GQN:m:1:3371220873:328926193ED0220EE3C71C3836DD4E97:r)**

| |
Fellow Conservative, it’s Herschel Walker. I know you’re busy, so I’ll be quick.

It’s official. Nikki Haley was right—Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we’re not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He’s weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we’re quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail. "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail. "so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?")**_

body:
| | If you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8Zskcis3__-5eemPkHkLYmF2u8Zn8t0-KWa71LMjitsdGdNfy-rQKxjrX2cf_rDf-W8LbiDG-P8RhDP20HMW3I5jej7HTv0l0dAQnjTV3SLbEes5gMRwYQIPEni9yCdGL8HqcK8i2GFaxv4SDmV1RzUuNSOzQGC4WOYBUZEwRzexY10LXspWhmXEVrbe41CQYJ97q3HLBgaPIO8OWmiRfpEsUOCWHuQrTyD0FP6FxCH-MYrLW0LKMFrRz6iWIxx7Mec4XnhzCSMVjPq2k15ovBYkb0bG_1XDUo2X4l6FcOlxszDwxjGq96hiXCZ2N-Eidw/3rm/HC9V5kyTSzasavmpekiHjw/h0/OImkE6-3TnRDk7P_BDmG30wHucg4uRkuoBZZME6u6qY) | | We’ll keep this quick because we know how much work we all have to do right now:

[We’re asking all of our top supporters to rush $10 right now split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and The Collective PAC, before midnight, to fuel our voter outreach work and help re-elect Rev. body:
We will beat Obama. We will beat Warnock. We will save America! |

Fellow American,

**Former President Barack Obama is coming back to stump for Senator Raphael Warnock in Georgia's Senate runoff TODAY.**

Obama's visit will create a lot of buzz and excitement with Democrat voters, so we need YOUR HELP to build our own momentum.

**[Watch a message from Herschel Walker and Lindsey Graham:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f8af911e03424fddb95e56fdf5d4db26&_e=uEnmh6ie8ysbJ3vGJaOCZeqYPGHgA8TtsPbLkKgY70SWSYLlVsDbrDDBZK8RsDGKU4oc1hTAS73nJowA8S30y9JFhSelJlWfr-L6yBp7BAIebFbDr0DTvklrxnIk02M0xG5usllq3ERuwxID3tBG_IJqOu6uCkEAovDT37aySwJiWHObMkvI7shGtWc1VS3biF2YPPi3sSc0CgUapiFZQWIm08YI_Omoc3dKlEwdrBzkgfPlpdh9elhUy9BMQ7Yfh2-EpwTzLT-XJldQvZBUxGNVGsLBe2NGzMZZiQW5uTpMwdGhfDzsA-Dmn-DIqZhPinuSHU5xN8Av8EzosEmWrfT9B-n2nqfF_dKjg3HKm1hDV7vuuM6Ub3AgPLbev82Ssl7K-rK9PQnGDMr86TvJM8zvYNGo-HLlu5d9nucy_vHWFY8POB17Sb8UHADf1fe3)**

We will save America!**

body:
We’re in trouble >>
| Look, this is a hard email to write.

But we just checked our Senate Expansion Fund, and we came up _$3,646 short of our $30,000 goal_ to protect Democrats like Raphael Warnock. ---
Listen, we're heartbroken... but right now we only have **two options:**

**OPTION 1:** Do nothing as Republicans flood Georgia with dark-money ads, send Herschel Walker SKYROCKETING in the polls, and _shatter_ our Senate majority...

**OPTION 2:** Step up and chip in $7 to help us close our $3,646 gap and do your part to save Democrats like Raphael Warnock! **_Saving this seat EXPANDS our Senate majority._**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Being honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can’t handle this loss
America can’t handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm3cad9dpms2dnemjkbt8mv5jqa0ulf12f6j46e0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh61ob6c5h2bs)
---
| |
Friend, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb3dap9d2qlmpta56hdvt5u7iu492l6akf8gi9m8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh61ob6c5h2bs "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_
---
| | | | | [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt073qvfpmb4spqd09dqcr48tq8c4ing9m9u39qg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh61ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z625o9adovfec4mlskuqitgh7uppuomk0lp03vlo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh61ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $20](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvou242eea2kqla2m2f3ji2i0e0qucu7aojldl88_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh61ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $30](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z60ebdv4pah19lntcb9a44bahvcp477pas1dgi6o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh61ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | | Democrats are already salivating about the liberal policies Raphael Warnock will help them pass in a Democrat-led Senate.

You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Friend?

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr1dmricfsapfav3tsp2qtpfplj3kp94jkblrh4o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjh61ob6c5h2bs "so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?")**_
---
|

---
To victory,

Herschel Walker
U.S. Senate Candidate

name: Team Hawley
subject: We’ll share the bad news first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, _We’ll break the bad news to you first._

We didn’t make our November grassroots goal. This kind of goal isn’t something we can skip past, so our team has extended our fundraising deadline an additional 48 HOURS to make up for lost resources.

The good news is that we have one last chance to meet this goal.

This election season isn’t over yet, and Senate Republicans will have much work to do going into 2023. The timing of this goal couldn’t be more critical, and it will take massive support from this team of patriots to make it.

We know the holidays are right around the corner, but we can’t lose focus on this fight until it’s over. To help Team Hawley stay on track, please pitch in anything you can today.

[**Pitch in TODAY so we can meet our EXTENDED end-of-month fundraising goal and TAKE BACK AMERICA!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=df2eb7f58be34e1b85294bb3e5af13dd&_e=g7xfrByhKqkh4noAkVVkp-WcFVMFr9XibxMoSAw_CKPg0wNASY2S8TzkMscmTwFsuc6uiaJCNbawLUSZEI9wTi0JObYFkAoCQoC5Sc_9flPSd5SbEDowIIRyV0h83qryipI2934wvDuY1N8oWPKfA-17_PeB2LNGxC6gzX1T-SfsMGqmuLmZ1mlgDxhxnUWb9zRasMjrEZQsKdqUJWxiqlv92M2jK8WXSy46V657pjqT6b0KWKsp73XUGBCEzALWcvCUMlhXjj1jFbXPG4V7jmKYjAlXKGT1sWi9bjKhZiaIbmv-4dAjQDUcIIrl0mJcRZVOQCjXeLNRk9C4ayy4eQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, We’ll break the bad news to you first. We didn’t make our November grassroots goal. This kind of goal isn’t something we can skip past, so our team has extended our fundraising deadline an additional 48 HOURS to make up for lost resources. The good news is that we have one last chance to meet this goal. This election season isn’t over yet, and Senate Republicans will have much work to do going into 2023. The timing of this goal couldn’t be more critical, and it will take massive support from this team of patriots to make it. We know the holidays are right around the corner, but we can’t lose focus on this fight until it’s over. To help Team Hawley stay on track, please pitch in anything you can today. Thank you, Team Hawley | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Mary Vought
subject: Build a Conservative Senate!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |

|

---
|
---
Peter: Conservative star Herschel Walker and woke, socialist Senator Raphael Warnock are locked in a runoff election in Georgia.
After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. _**And so do we!**_
**[Please contribute to Herschel Walker's campaign!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62006159:JAvbC2GNz:m:1:3331703221:7F05077491727ECD5B90A2B5B419A0E6:r)**
The Georgia Senate runoff election will be on December 6, so we don't have much time. The entire Democrat Party, the media, and woke corporations will be pouring money and propaganda into this race.
Herschel Walker doesn't have Wall Street, Silicon Valley, and the Swamp. His campaign can only rely on two things now: _**conservative principles and us.**_
The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he's got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth... ▶︎ To fight inflation?
▶︎ To drill more oil and natural gas?
▶︎ To protect our daughters from woke extremists?
▶︎ To rescue our classrooms from racist indoctrination?
▶︎ To secure our border?
▶︎ To clean up our streets?
**[Please chip in to Herschel Walker's campaign to build a conservative Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62006159:JAvbC2GNz:m:1:3331703221:7F05077491727ECD5B90A2B5B419A0E6:r)**
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs. Together, we can help send Herschel Walker to Washington to fight for our values.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support strong candidates. Sincerely,
---
---
Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
**GEORGIA RUNOFF** **COUNTDOWN**

Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. body:
But in order to get a good understanding of each state’s priorities, we need supporters from every state (including yours!) to respond today. | | |
---
| | Here at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, the core of our work is electing Democratic state legislators in all 50 states. Last month, we had the best Election Day for the president’s party since at least 1934 – and we were only able to do it with the help of our grassroots supporters. But there’re no days off when it comes to this work – right now, we’re beginning to develop our strategy for 2023, 2024, and beyond – so we’re coming to you today. **In order to get a clear picture of the issues that our supporters care most about, we need people from _every_ state (including yours!) to respond today. ** | **2022 LOCAL PRIORITIES SURVEY**

clean_body: But in order to get a good understanding of each state’s priorities, we need supporters from every state (including yours!) to respond today. | | | | | Here at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, the core of our work is electing Democratic state legislators in all 50 states. Last month, we had the best Election Day for the president’s party since at least 1934 – and we were only able to do it with the help of our grassroots supporters. But there’re no days off when it comes to this work – right now, we’re beginning to develop our strategy for 2023, 2024, and beyond – so we’re coming to you today. In order to get a clear picture of the issues that our supporters care most about, we need people from every state (including yours!) to respond today. | 2022 LOCAL PRIORITIES SURVEY Date: 12.01.2022 Supporter: Representing: Local Democrats Response:Pending Your participation is crucial – your responses will help us determine what issues are important to Democrats in your area and where our efforts are best focused. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rand=20Paul?=
subject: Why I haven’t lost hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Protect Freedom PAC |
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | Friend, it’s Rand Paul.
The fight for liberty **ISN’T** over. With Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock of Georgia moving into a runoff on December 6th, _**we have 1 final chance to narrow Democrat control of the Senate.**_ And _everything_ hinges on winning this critical seat. With most Democrat seats up for grabs in 2024, we need to win every seat possible NOW to help us take control of the Senate. This next election is the last opportunity for me to lead a committee to investigate the origins of COVID because Democrats refuse to. It’s the last opportunity for someone to _finally_ hold Dr. Fauci accountable for all the lies and destruction he inflicted on the American people. If you want a conservative senator like me leading those efforts in the U.S. Senate, then I need **YOUR SUPPORT.** **The _Protect Freedom PAC_ is working in Georgia to ensure that Herschel Walker is victorious on December 6th.** [**Friend, with liberty on the line and the fate of our country hanging in the balance, will rush a critical victory donation now to send Walker to Victory?**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=48f93e2a72&e=fdefed58de)

Now he's looking to have a bigger impact in the runoff. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Just look at this amazing news out of the start of early voting we’re proud to have played a part in: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55412548/381597327/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221201SecondTeam_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjc5ZWNmLWMxNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lahUlovoRJ3R6q2DUjMLlBoIn0XClvy-JhlaHrAo8Tg=) **[Fellow activist, this is a promising start — but we can’t let up on the gas yet. Will you chip in $10 right now to help us send a second team of organizers to get out the vote in Georgia?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55412551/381597328/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221201SecondTeam_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjc5ZWNmLWMxNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lahUlovoRJ3R6q2DUjMLlBoIn0XClvy-JhlaHrAo8Tg=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55412553/381597329/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221201SecondTeam_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_N_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjc5ZWNmLWMxNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lahUlovoRJ3R6q2DUjMLlBoIn0XClvy-JhlaHrAo8Tg=) In solidarity,

Team NPP [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55412556/381597330/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221201SecondTeam_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_N_Signoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjc5ZWNmLWMxNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lahUlovoRJ3R6q2DUjMLlBoIn0XClvy-JhlaHrAo8Tg=) \---------- Forwarded message --------- Fellow activist, you surely know by now that we’ve deployed to Georgia — but did you know **_the PA GOP did as well?_** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55412559/381597331/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221201EOM2fwd_N_KK_90DO_4_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjc5ZWNmLWMxNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lahUlovoRJ3R6q2DUjMLlBoIn0XClvy-JhlaHrAo8Tg=) I was as shocked as you — they’re really calling themselves a “Victory Team” after losing their own state’s elections across the board! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55412561/381597332/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221201EOM2fwd_N_KK_90DO_4_G_N_G2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjc5ZWNmLWMxNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lahUlovoRJ3R6q2DUjMLlBoIn0XClvy-JhlaHrAo8Tg=) Our picture looks much different than the one above. Team NPP represents the communities we center, not just in Pennsylvania, but across the country. Our core belief is empowering historically disenfranchised, Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth to vote.

Our organizing staff has been door-knocking since Saturday, and we will all be catching flights back to Pennsylvania today. However, Georgia needs all hands on deck.

**[So I’m deploying a SECOND team of our organizers who will be using their canvassing skill sets to get out the vote in this final push! Will you donate $10 right now to help send this much-needed backup to Georgia? We’re still $2,170 short of our end-of-month goal, and this is going to drain our budget even more.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55412562/381597333/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221201EOM2fwd_N_KK_90DO_4_G_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjc5ZWNmLWMxNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lahUlovoRJ3R6q2DUjMLlBoIn0XClvy-JhlaHrAo8Tg=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55412563/381597334/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221201EOM2fwd_N_KK_90DO_4_G_N_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjc5ZWNmLWMxNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lahUlovoRJ3R6q2DUjMLlBoIn0XClvy-JhlaHrAo8Tg=) In solidarity,

Kadida Kenner

_The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55412564/381597335/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221201EOM2fwd_N_KK_90DO_4_G_N_Signoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjc5ZWNmLWMxNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lahUlovoRJ3R6q2DUjMLlBoIn0XClvy-JhlaHrAo8Tg=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. name: Herschel Walker HQ
subject: BREAKING: Obama’s coming back to Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We will beat Obama. We will beat Warnock. We will save America!
|
---
Fellow American,

**Former President Barack Obama is coming back to stump for Senator Raphael Warnock in Georgia's Senate runoff TODAY.**

Obama's visit will create a lot of buzz and excitement with Democrat voters, so we need YOUR HELP to build our own momentum.
