Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000156:6KkCY2GVN:m:1:3371812801:5539E4DCA96A7D9570FC86244967DF21:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000157:6KkCY2GVN:m:1:3371812801:5539E4DCA96A7D9570FC86244967DF21:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000156:6KkCY2GVN:m:1:3371812801:5539E4DCA96A7D9570FC86244967DF21:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000157:6KkCY2GVN:m:1:3371812801:5539E4DCA96A7D9570FC86244967DF21:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000156:6KkCY2GVN:m:1:3371812801:5539E4DCA96A7D9570FC86244967DF21:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000156:6KkCY2GVN:m:1:3371812801:5539E4DCA96A7D9570FC86244967DF21:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000156:6KkCY2GVN:m:1:3371812801:5539E4DCA96A7D9570FC86244967DF21:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000156:6KkCY2GVN:m:1:3371812801:5539E4DCA96A7D9570FC86244967DF21:r)

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Fitch and NAAG
body:
Mississippi Attorney General Regional Chair of Liberal Organization Yesterday, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus sent a letter to Attorney General Lynn Fitch asking her to withdraw from the National | |
---

| | | Mississippi Attorney General Regional Chair of Liberal Organization |
---|---|---
| | | Yesterday, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus sent a letter to Attorney General Lynn Fitch asking her to withdraw from the National Association of Attorney Generals (NAAG). While this organization claims to be “nonpartisan”, its actions prove it to be a left-leaning liberal organization.Read about our letter reported by [_Breitbart News_](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/S3TU1tEK4pOEZN_V21tE8Q) Conservative Attorney Generals from around the nation have withdrawn from NAAG due to the organization's “leftward shift over the past half decade . . .”In addition to advancing liberal Democrat policies, this organization also takes a cut of settlements made by participating states, creating a slush fund used to promote its policies without any oversight by state legislatures.It is time AG Fitch resigned her position as southern region chair of NAAG and withdrew the state of Mississippi from an organization that works against the values and beliefs of it's citizens.We need your help. TAKE ACTION NOW! By sending an email to Mississippi AG Lynn Fitch.

name: WFP Election Alert
subject: Warnock poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This will be a close race - but we know what we need to do to win. | | | Peter, The first public poll of the Georgia runoff for Senate came out last week. Here are some of the findings:1
* Raphael Warnock leads Herschel Walker overall by a margin of 51%-47%.
* Voters under the age of 50, independents, and Black voters all break for Warnock by significant margins.
* _96%_ of likely voters in this poll say they voted in the general election.

**This will be a close race — again — but we know who we need to turn out to win. Now we just need to do the work.** **[Can you make a $4 donation today to help us mobilize voters in Georgia to elect Sen. Warnock?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU6PpqJRqkUcqWvGx_Zys-TzuAqCkVKwbEiaqCY4DlqgEYMpjaW0nMwUYLWHzbEiDDinrP6fmMzbBkVl3N9au1qUL6KU1fW_1mn-KgPg_u13vRNpAJzQgtpzWwePVKHO31UYJb40g6aAqazyw1UaTA3OdBkt0lP6shedvlWjEHFlUeKKTTrBtviwXEgEFYbsCKTCPSd2Kmf10OrPgSvps4JuHt87zIkqA_ZFGi3eCL-g9HNhe_en8iKM993DJEz2WX_2c5MXpPlmJr2we-hZRcvBBTAPeNuLRBMhhqwyDPnT0/3rm/Md-UfbDMTP2EIuqrgD_lUA/h0/BCI1k6ByYdqX9tkew9A2sRvTHYdvCiMtCPH2vX03r-A)** **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU6PpqJRqkUcqWvGx_Zys-TzuAqCkVKwbEiaqCY4DlqgHXi1MCCxWVBAIEMOvQnDU3YQObjOOmigsQOBQo_5haB5RnekusGUSqUFlmWQSx5i7v-XAzlkatsmJT524wnkLkbJxeqjksPeT9rKKde-EpzQ7fa71n0AiK2VM5TB8cLYO6Oxm-dDQFFaVbNBGL3iQMpymWUZITGJwnVznn7u6bpntA6O570X1RvbSNdlSlPBLUI1AEoB10i2Egx7wGtVquWMjUQtgSXK4uSoR0rPFylg/3rm/Md-UfbDMTP2EIuqrgD_lUA/h1/XF0TGTE8o6ZyVZf7R7YhthPbi_6H1gYnqmDSn8eVxwE)** WFP has a long history of organizing and community-building in Georgia, Peter. **We launched our efforts in Georgia in 2017. And every year since we have been on the ground, even in “off years,” organizing and strengthening our coalition.** In 2020, WFP organizers in Georgia sent more than 1.4 million texts, made over 400,000 phone calls, and trained and activated more than 250 local volunteers. During the runoffs in 2021, we sent over 7.4 million texts, made over 560,000 calls, and knocked on more than 230,000 doors in just six weeks. Now, with just under a week to go until the December 6th runoff, we’ve already sent nearly 400,000 texts, knocked on nearly 30,000 doors, and launched digital ads as part of a comprehensive, data-driven program — just like we’ve done in the past to great success. **But in a race this close, with a timeline this short, and with a critical 51st vote in the Senate on the line, we need to take full advantage of every opportunity over the next few days.** **[Peter, we know our organizing works. Now, it’s time for us to do it again — but we need your help. clean_body: This will be a close race - but we know what we need to do to win. | | | Peter, The first public poll of the Georgia runoff for Senate came out last week. Here are some of the findings:1 Raphael Warnock leads Herschel Walker overall by a margin of 51%-47%. Voters under the age of 50, independents, and Black voters all break for Warnock by significant margins. 96% of likely voters in this poll say they voted in the general election. This will be a close race — again — but we know who we need to turn out to win. Now we just need to do the work. WFP has a long history of organizing and community-building in Georgia, Peter. We launched our efforts in Georgia in 2017. And every year since we have been on the ground, even in “off years,” organizing and strengthening our coalition. In 2020, WFP organizers in Georgia sent more than 1.4 million texts, made over 400,000 phone calls, and trained and activated more than 250 local volunteers. During the runoffs in 2021, we sent over 7.4 million texts, made over 560,000 calls, and knocked on more than 230,000 doors in just six weeks. Now, with just under a week to go until the December 6th runoff, we’ve already sent nearly 400,000 texts, knocked on nearly 30,000 doors, and launched digital ads as part of a comprehensive, data-driven program — just like we’ve done in the past to great success. But in a race this close, with a timeline this short, and with a critical 51st vote in the Senate on the line, we need to take full advantage of every opportunity over the next few days. Thanks for your help, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , AARP, November, 2022. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk3v0bvto3am7k5np4a6k2vc0qsono9e9mc56588_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjj64o36cjh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeqm7tcsj4b1bmclrqjdloo5239qdqsmc3p8ibr8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjj64o36cjh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2rkc8d8cpu3k84oge0pkijfo2fed2pqhdf864io_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjj64o36cjh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7oioh0i48qpe7j526epgkot44fajc0fsvn16ph0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjj64o36cjh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs370cmkmufcd9t7ulfhngj8uha0mpn6t9835aig_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjj64o36cjh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zun5m3qmftmr8nbmldv2l7is7pv54g0kctv1d3p0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjj64o36cjh2bs)
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs23nsgiemj37blh94js6tpkq64hk5vaec41kqao_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjj64o36c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1j7c2lduv8prth3s8addduvetd93tn10ajc5bp0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjj64o36c3h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2qu1t7gvvclcn4f9705q13b3oka8qmhe9151h3g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjj64o36c3h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: TOMORROW in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
We urgently need to get more resources to Team Herschel so they can contact more supporters in these final hours. |
---

Fellow American - Early voting ends TOMORROW in Georgia's Senate runoff!

Herschel Walker urgently needs to turn out more supporters in the final hours of the race. **I told Herschel that I'd contact my top supporters to ask them to help immediately.**

I'm getting ready to go on Fox News to give an update from Herschel's rally in Georgia, and I want to be able to tell Sean Hannity that over 400 supporters stepped up for Herschel in the last 30 minutes. [**Will you be one of those conservatives and stand with Herschel NOW?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61209860:WRZxQmD-N:m:1:877327319:80358E517B54E05FDCB47AC3FDD8CF14:r)

| [** STEP UP NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61209860:WRZxQmD-N:m:1:877327319:80358E517B54E05FDCB47AC3FDD8CF14:r)
---

The race is TIED, and we're out of time. It's now or never!

Thank you, Fellow American!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61209860:WRZxQmD-N:m:1:877327319:80358E517B54E05FDCB47AC3FDD8CF14:r)

Lindsey Graham

* * *
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61209861:WRZxQmD-N:m:1:877327319:80358E517B54E05FDCB47AC3FDD8CF14:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61209861:WRZxQmD-N:m:1:877327319:80358E517B54E05FDCB47AC3FDD8CF14:r)
---

We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. subject: It's not enough.

Make sure your donation has FOUR TIMES THE IMPACT!
| | | **President Obama is counting on YOU to help protect Senator Warnock’s seat and fight for our Senate majority** \-- **_but your donation is MISSING ahead of our urgent midnight deadline!**_

**SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 (BECOMES $20)**

**[Will you help us answer the call by chipping in $5 _(becomes $20)_ to fight for our Democratic Senate? Your donation will be QUADRUPLED to stop Mitch McConnell in his tracks! >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11269?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221201-MatchActivated-ObamaTMGARF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221201-MatchActivated-ObamaTMGARF-Pros-sl1&akid=8956%2E9716520%2EGSD6b5)**

Team -- Just weeks ago, Democrats across the country stood with President Obama and DEFIED HISTORY by protecting our _razor-thin_ Senate majority.

**But now, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are spending MILLIONS to flip Senator Warnock’s seat in Georgia. Here’s what we’re up against:**

\-- Georgia Republicans have passed shameful restrictions on early voting for this runoff. \-- GOP ads are already blanketing the airwaves attacking Senator Warnock. \-- And even though our QUADRUPLE-IMPACT MATCH offer is active, **not enough Democrats in Pennsylvania are helping us fight back.**

This needs to be your top priority today because we are NOT on track to raise the funds required to defend our Senate majority and re-elect Senator Warnock in the _must-win_ Georgia runoff election.

**[Please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $20)_ or even more so we can hit our CRUCIAL midnight fundraising goal to defend Democrats like Sen. Warnock and fight for the Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/11269?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221201-MatchActivated-ObamaTMGARF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221201-MatchActivated-ObamaTMGARF-Pros-sl1&akid=8956%2E9716520%2EGSD6b5)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Turnout is all that counts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Fellow American - Turnout is key to winning Georgia’s Senate runoff election next Tuesday, December 6 |
---
Fellow American - Turnout is key to winning Georgia's Senate runoff election next Tuesday, December 6th.

Monday, early voting began in all 159 counties across the state, and voters in Georgia are turning out in record numbers:

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=17cabcc61ac74b52ae5bf32c8ac887e7&_e=c-aYvGJgLQV1BOeL_3e7ZobqZI4lJLTB1rf8b6YISrN4ZnN-Sun5M7mLC7u5jAPm2V_iXQtHnaGvHyYi5AMWd8N09zqImPz7tGVCzf33N-87i3AaZTHtuTQOV7EtqZIvSLuOT3PF9UWm5AWOsVVxMv8r9VgauDTewz_wdxLg8z6JaNQ7rGdMDB95O3r9OT9XDabWX7oNMbS3yB12EhIH0JhtyLzOt6qLqn4C7ztJYrZkLs8hQR3201OWRTiN92DoJdjup177dGQhze4AyCEnveVxJPmgeSQ3xcIyYmyk7gi6SD3_pj31xn5aFiMq-61yHxSjgoJW3xu_87dDOoTBX29g_c3VfUzz8FlPHVu2Mf50y6vtUyNVnxOl7QvN-szusdobEgfxUJO4whEpSrhZZ8stPrksF-ErI7pAATMKbJjltVeGEmKWrMH1XLbdJM2P2s3IGIhY6QcSySd2VlP0AdpPngnW_Sej9ZfzLDowj39C60-AKf0EtUrNVOQL084S)
For the general election, we kept Senator Warnock under 50% of the vote - even after he spent over $100 MILLION on his campaign! Out of more than 3.9 million votes that were cast in this race, we were only 0.9% behind him.

_**Fast-forward three weeks, and new polling shows the RACE IS TIED once again!**_

**Therefore, the old adage about runoff elections is truer now more than ever:**

**Turnout is key.
Turnout is key.
Turnout is key.**
As you know, a strong voter turnout program costs money.

**I know you're tired of these emails, and we're tired of sending them. But the truth is the money we raise from short notes like this help fund the overwhelming majority of our turnout operation.**

[** HELP US REACH GEORGIA VOTERS ->**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=17cabcc61ac74b52ae5bf32c8ac887e7&_e=c-aYvGJgLQV1BOeL_3e7ZobqZI4lJLTB1rf8b6YISrN4ZnN-Sun5M7mLC7u5jAPm2V_iXQtHnaGvHyYi5AMWd8N09zqImPz7tGVCzf33N-87i3AaZTHtuTQOV7EtqZIvSLuOT3PF9UWm5AWOsVVxMv8r9VgauDTewz_wdxLg8z6JaNQ7rGdMDB95O3r9OT9XDabWX7oNMbS3yB12EhIH0JhtyLzOt6qLqn4C7ztJYrZkLs8hQR3201OWRTiN92DoJdjup177dGQhze4AyCEnveVxJPmgeSQ3xcIyYmyk7gi6SD3_pj31xn5aFiMq-61yHxSjgoJW3xu_87dDOoTBXyQxjCxYwztrY_XqB1kehiJaex4sMIDwZfieKwifj9Wqiw8FgwkpIASpBS3If7i-DnWA9ZdYktaRsIW4Y-BrHAJ_rmmvUa-TcIfTnsCZFRO-m5yOQ6YODiMjvC2OKVInhGvtYfekNCOStBIVUpLHf8OIQylLVkXR0AJOVNdulf3p)
**_With just FIVE days remaining until the runoff election, I'm pleading with you to help us turn out more supporters._ [If you chip in $6 right now, we'll be able to contact a voter who otherwise probably won't cast a ballot next Tuesday - _and probably doesn't even know the date of the runoff election!_](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=17cabcc61ac74b52ae5bf32c8ac887e7&_e=c-aYvGJgLQV1BOeL_3e7ZobqZI4lJLTB1rf8b6YISrN4ZnN-Sun5M7mLC7u5jAPm2V_iXQtHnaGvHyYi5AMWd8N09zqImPz7tGVCzf33N-87i3AaZTHtuTQOV7EtqZIvSLuOT3PF9UWm5AWOsVVxMv8r9VgauDTewz_wdxLg8z6JaNQ7rGdMDB95O3r9OT9XDabWX7oNMbS3yB12EhIH0JhtyLzOt6qLqn4C7ztJYrZkLs8hQR3201OWRTiN92DoJdjup177dGQhze4AyCEnveVxJPmgeSQ3xcIyYmyk7gi6SD3_pj31xn5aFiMq-61yHxSjgoJW3xu_87dDOoTBX0-6vlMjdhQEULFMlCUvmTNf6KRtQyo3qo5uaBLdSRh077PPlIvLuH05tbFPKkydWeI1OLo-OVNLo3Uhg9blDqk5z1Pva8xqY-onno5xOEw66kIq94HeyQO-VVoiKGRwhpv0g9ZK1r4sjagfpJP85cmYRt8hO4icEK6uXprqJmUp)**

Georgia is on track to set new early voting records. Since most Democrats prefer to vote early while many Republicans like to vote on Election Day, a majority of the early votes cast were likely for my opponent. With early voting ending TOMORROW, _it's critical that we expand our efforts to turn out as many supporters as possible._

[** HELP US REACH GEORGIA VOTERS ->**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=17cabcc61ac74b52ae5bf32c8ac887e7&_e=c-aYvGJgLQV1BOeL_3e7ZobqZI4lJLTB1rf8b6YISrN4ZnN-Sun5M7mLC7u5jAPm2V_iXQtHnaGvHyYi5AMWd8N09zqImPz7tGVCzf33N-87i3AaZTHtuTQOV7EtqZIvSLuOT3PF9UWm5AWOsVVxMv8r9VgauDTewz_wdxLg8z6JaNQ7rGdMDB95O3r9OT9XDabWX7oNMbS3yB12EhIH0JhtyLzOt6qLqn4C7ztJYrZkLs8hQR3201OWRTiN92DoJdjup177dGQhze4AyCEnveVxJPmgeSQ3xcIyYmyk7gi6SD3_pj31xn5aFiMq-61yHxSjgoJW3xu_87dDOoTBX63pGRpDCuU53PDtJhh54NCr10MM2YZYuNVkhTO6WdSDeEUuEyh4L29UC6LKyGiYKseixEzEhFxnjXc-PmStYFdFaqRcIF7d__Q-gs8-gQIwsEsb8HmvYEiIxyxwP08_7hqr39bMhkB69fY4ZhcBfrG5k32v_GNS6uD8NtMW99Kh)
If ever there were a time to invest in our campaign, it's now.

clean_body: Fellow American - Turnout is key to winning Georgia’s Senate runoff election next Tuesday, December 6 | Fellow American - Turnout is key to winning Georgia's Senate runoff election next Tuesday, December 6th. Monday, early voting began in all 159 counties across the state, and voters in Georgia are turning out in record numbers: For the general election, we kept Senator Warnock under 50% of the vote - even after he spent over $100 MILLION on his campaign! Out of more than 3.9 million votes that were cast in this race, we were only 0.9% behind him. Fast-forward three weeks, and new polling shows the RACE IS TIED once again! Therefore, the old adage about runoff elections is truer now more than ever: Turnout is key. Turnout is key. Turnout is key. As you know, a strong voter turnout program costs money. I know you're tired of these emails, and we're tired of sending them. But the truth is the money we raise from short notes like this help fund the overwhelming majority of our turnout operation. With just FIVE days remaining until the runoff election, I'm pleading with you to help us turn out more supporters. Georgia is on track to set new early voting records. Since most Democrats prefer to vote early while many Republicans like to vote on Election Day, a majority of the early votes cast were likely for my opponent. With early voting ending TOMORROW, it's critical that we expand our efforts to turn out as many supporters as possible. If ever there were a time to invest in our campaign, it's now. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Peter,

We've officially entered the final month of 2022, and it's been an eventful year. In the House, Kim and her Democratic colleagues passed legislation to lower costs, protect access to abortion, improve our nation's infrastructure, end gun violence, and so much more.

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55419272/381602187/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3816-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFhMjk2My1jODcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jHXBVRaXI4xYO9Xszzo_1oMC7qLXJbpBFAepsjuehZ0=)**
GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Candidate Spotlight: Ellen Weaver, South Carolina’s New Superintendent of Education
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
Parents are looking for answers to the education crisis unraveling around us. Nearly two-thirds of American students aren’t competent in reading or math. It’s the steepest decline ever recorded in math and the worst in reading in 30 years. These issues won’t be fixed overnight, and they certainly won’t be fixed if the Left continues to prioritize woke indoctrination over learning how to read and write. That’s why we need leaders who will tackle the problems facing our education system head-on. Leaders who will put learning at the forefront of the classroom and leave the Left’s woke agenda behind.
---
| | That’s why I was proud to endorse Ellen Weaver for South Carolina Superintendent of Education, and I was thrilled to see her win this past November. As the founder of a conservative think tank and a member of the South Carolina Education Oversight Committee, Ellen Weaver knows the ins and outs of the school system. She will listen to the voices of all students, parents, and teachers.
---
|
---
| | Ellen Weaver ran as a strong conservative champion for everyone involved in education. She will prioritize students, support teachers, and empower parents. I’m excited to see what Ellen Weaver does for the great people of South Carolina. My very best,
---
---
Nikki Haley
---
|
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=262d5bf9de5143acafba49b0b0d7b7c3&_e=gr8iJZvi_9gEuQW85bzhfu3JuVEqlxyLA3R4dAyBXfoysryU7pVzQFHafZlbmeri6FdK6jIhn0K49CeF9ahtUMRr7sYjk-RJg9bcxgdbvEophaiv78Sm_bXBANcso8Ta-z4SqDNcUPR8cis-JSzey_qbX6Z1yAqQCQ2SSq4VyK-GYBm7CrwT_wgBtgFGraYW59R4WHLTqvsjlB-l2NRV03GQQgHPp_yHJtL95mY-7Lb9nm_eJmnWcydPtqFtOL3X7yhhrKbHRaL20YEX2HsrXmzwTMt7Z-jwhBsBioeQDMSHvH57GbYHJAHVdUTXuaHbuEn0Q9pjle7ATsZ0oI2ys93iwbKcD_FyXIyu7hxwfVSlfALZia3BPB1E5ovaEQYn)

clean_body: | | | Friend, Parents are looking for answers to the education crisis unraveling around us. Nearly two-thirds of American students aren’t competent in reading or math. It’s the steepest decline ever recorded in math and the worst in reading in 30 years. These issues won’t be fixed overnight, and they certainly won’t be fixed if the Left continues to prioritize woke indoctrination over learning how to read and write. That’s why we need leaders who will tackle the problems facing our education system head-on. Leaders who will put learning at the forefront of the classroom and leave the Left’s woke agenda behind. | | That’s why I was proud to endorse Ellen Weaver for South Carolina Superintendent of Education, and I was thrilled to see her win this past November. As the founder of a conservative think tank and a member of the South Carolina Education Oversight Committee, Ellen Weaver knows the ins and outs of the school system. She will listen to the voices of all students, parents, and teachers. | | | Ellen Weaver ran as a strong conservative champion for everyone involved in education. She will prioritize students, support teachers, and empower parents. I’m excited to see what Ellen Weaver does for the great people of South Carolina. My very best, Nikki Haley | Special Message from Nikki Haley: I’ve been fighting every day to support leaders who believe America is inherently good and who understand that Democrats’ far-left policies undermine our freedoms. This work is far from over. | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I hold onto a persistent belief that more is possible in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Support the Georgia Runoff Fund and help send my dear friend Reverend Raphael Warnock back to the U.S. Senate. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55419933/381604617/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_sya_20221201_f_runoff_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDIyZjRmYy1jYjcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDzxQaU1nKXyLaM4MYVdWr8HMUhrypRO5p4Lh8IW5KM=&emci=fff4eff6-cb71-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=5d22f4fc-cb71-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1037277)

| | First of all, thank you for everything you’ve done to defend the freedom to vote. Thank you for believing in what we can achieve together. Thank you for fighting for a future for Georgians where everyone has access to education, health care, housing and a good living. And thank you for pushing to make our elections free, fair and secure. Each day, I think about the people I’ve met across Georgia. Like my family and me, they wake up each day with a persistent belief that more is possible. Our work continues, so I’m going to ask if you can [_**make a donation to Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55419934/381604618/147276702?refcode=bsc_emm_sya_20221201_f_runoff_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDIyZjRmYy1jYjcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDzxQaU1nKXyLaM4MYVdWr8HMUhrypRO5p4Lh8IW5KM=) to help send my dear friend Reverend Raphael Warnock back to the U.S. Senate. But before I get to that, I want to talk about why this particular organization is such a meaningful destination for your dollars at this pivotal moment. **I started Fair Fight after the 2018 election because I believe that every eligible voter should be able to easily register to vote, cast their ballot and have that ballot counted.** Since then, Fair Fight has successfully combated voter suppression, made it possible for more people to exercise their power and their voice at the ballot box and helped elect pro-democracy champions like Senator Warnock to represent Georgia. Now, Fair Fight is working around the clock to re-elect Senator Warnock in Georgia’s Runoff Election — and to ensure that Georgians can make their voices heard and have their votes counted. Fair Fight was born for moments like this, but their team needs our help. [_**Will you make a donation of $20 or any amount to Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund today? Thank you for believing in what we can achieve together. Thank you for fighting for a future for Georgians where everyone has access to education, health care, housing and a good living. And thank you for pushing to make our elections free, fair and secure. Each day, I think about the people I’ve met across Georgia. Like my family and me, they wake up each day with a persistent belief that more is possible. Our work continues, so I’m going to ask if you can = to help send my dear friend Reverend Raphael Warnock back to the U.S. Senate. But before I get to that, I want to talk about why this particular organization is such a meaningful destination for your dollars at this pivotal moment. I started Fair Fight after the 2018 election because I believe that every eligible voter should be able to easily register to vote, cast their ballot and have that ballot counted. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: new territory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight.

|
---
| Peter: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. Here's why:

• FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win.

• BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election.

**• NOW, we need _all hands on deck_ to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 328 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short.

So much is at stake. We got to this point without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment.

name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: I hope you’ll split a $10 donation between RaphaelWarnock’s reelection campaign and the DNC.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Raphael Warnock is facing a runoff on Tuesday, and he’s relying on the immediate support of folks like you. | |
---
After you elected Kamala and me back in 2020, you didn’t take a second to rest. You turned right around and helped flip Georgia’s Senate seats, too. Now, one of those Georgia senators -- my friend Reverend Raphael Warnock -- is up for reelection to serve a full term, and he needs your help once again. He’s facing a runoff on Tuesday, and polls are showing him neck and neck with his ultra-MAGA GOP opponent. clean_body: Raphael Warnock is facing a runoff on Tuesday, and he’s relying on the immediate support of folks like you. | | After you elected Kamala and me back in 2020, you didn’t take a second to rest. You turned right around and helped flip Georgia’s Senate seats, too. Now, one of those Georgia senators -- my friend Reverend Raphael Warnock -- is up for reelection to serve a full term, and he needs your help once again. He’s facing a runoff on Tuesday, and polls are showing him neck and neck with his ultra-MAGA GOP opponent. With only five days until the runoff and early voting already underway across the state, Senator Warnock is relying on the immediate support of folks like you. You haven’t donated to the DNC yet this year. Will you split a $10 donation between Senator Warnock’s campaign and the DNC today to support his campaign and elect Democrats nationwide? Senator Warnock is running to continue to help working families succeed, boost our economy, secure investments in education, and empower communities everywhere. He’s the kind of fighter Georgians deserve. But I’ll be honest, Derek: We’re in the final sprint in this runoff, and there’s no waiting until later to act. There are no do-overs. That’s why we’re counting on you and this grassroots team to help expand our Democratic majority in the Senate. It looks like you haven’t donated this year, so I’m asking you to support Senator Warnock’s campaign and Democrats nationwide. Thank you for your support, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can to stop receiving these emails. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Adam Frisch
subject: Sharing an update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
I want to share an update following yesterday's Secretary of State announcement of a mandatory recount. Since the results were so close, we have been expecting this as a mandatory part of Colorado's voting process. | | | [](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_m=d006a3bfde734f198c6585003c5b61ba&_e=x_NkASzNydl4UvLLJh-aEhZ3QpOBLulXWkgk2jCqpNv_vziz40i45pi65c7cPWBQi4RaQh0albdA45fUiq3cJvMtWDlsmzF_xlAo-eygqKsP9hOPKTCmlucnaX0G-mBC3ukZKsqAzGwg1WsnI2bI11bbyWewJOSgnQdE5G9rLZCvT5e73MztJtwKN7pZSvHk795SAZobKlOVbszEQnPuuQ%3D%3D) Good morning -I want to share an update following yesterday's Secretary of State announcement of a mandatory recount. Since the results were so close, we have been expecting this as a mandatory part of Colorado's voting process. The recount is one of the measures that protects and helps ensure the sanctity of Colorado elections and the decision to conduct a recount is (rightfully so) not influenced by any campaign or candidate. I have said from the beginning that I will honor the certified results of the Colorado Secretary of State, and Coloradans deserve to have this legally mandated process take place.Colorado Politics provides additional details in this article: [Mandatory recount ordered in congressional race between Lauren Boebert and Adam Frisch](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_m=d006a3bfde734f198c6585003c5b61ba&_e=x_NkASzNydl4UvLLJh-aEouXE0p_ZUBZeYm_s5AFprBh3QK884a1xFI6Vt5aDkEk0cdouKVQEY9fePTv28zpyF_3JHb2OZ3_6X3uWWao1E-zcqzf0vOWsDaLnEv9Hv-IEAvdZ2Dfs_Ltn8-htTVje-rbeF-vjoORKS5D7N4CXaCzZM69y_2kBGf1cmy_zEN7wmNC67PJvm44sGRpl8i59uj8dZuxhgSTqnsBX32_M6cImJbmkEvd-i_dNjpPt3sLN8P83moSkzaoS-joauWz9jvuFnjDk2MbPcKLp1KMIdfCYMQZyROW1HYKjWltsTEpiGrtnOK5Lq02Jjn28bFiUD6VAgYh3ar8W-2dTRb-wSqoVwTz7cYZFnYmBmX_PjwIoxWoLnc7eunalNvzSI1qZj1FtUY3A4ZWwzlw2Y7r414%3D)While I am fully supportive of the recount process, based on the history of Colorado recounts, I could not, in good faith, perpetuate false hope that there is a good chance of the recount changing the outcome of this election. That is why on November 18th, I publicly conceded this race to my opponent. When I launched this campaign, I promised to run this race with integrity because that is who I am. I could not look people in the eye and raise money when the votes were already cast, ballots cured, and the final election results were in the hands of Colorado's competent Secretary of State - and no amount of money could change them.The race for Colorado's 3rd Congressional District has become the closest election in the nation this year, and folks have been shocked, especially given this district's 9 point Republican advantage. With support from so many of you, my team and I are very proud of the race we ran. It clearly shows a rejection of extremism and a lack of focus by the incumbent on the citizens of Western & Southern Colorado by Democrats, Independents, and Republicans alike.My concession remains sincere but has no legal implications – under no circumstances did I want it to stop (which it legally cannot) this recount of votes. If, by some slight chance, there is a big enough vote swing to put us in the lead after the recount, we would be certified the winner and sworn into congress on January 3rd. But the reality is we do not expect the results of this election to change with the recount.In the meantime, plans for the recount are being finalized today by each of the 27 counties in the district. I will keep you updated on the progress and share the information we have with you, but at this time, we can expect the results of the recount no later than December 13th.Thank you for keeping the faith, for your support throughout this campaign, and for believing in the democratic processes that define our country.With gratitude –
Adam

clean_body: I want to share an update following yesterday's Secretary of State announcement of a mandatory recount. Since the results were so close, we have been expecting this as a mandatory part of Colorado's voting process. | | | Good morning -I want to share an update following yesterday's Secretary of State announcement of a mandatory recount. Since the results were so close, we have been expecting this as a mandatory part of Colorado's voting process. The recount is one of the measures that protects and helps ensure the sanctity of Colorado elections and the decision to conduct a recount is (rightfully so) not influenced by any campaign or candidate. I have said from the beginning that I will honor the certified results of the Colorado Secretary of State, and Coloradans deserve to have this legally mandated process take place.Colorado Politics provides additional details in this article: I am fully supportive of the recount process, based on the history of Colorado recounts, I could not, in good faith, perpetuate false hope that there is a good chance of the recount changing the outcome of this election. That is why on November 18th, I publicly conceded this race to my opponent. When I launched this campaign, I promised to run this race with integrity because that is who I am. I could not look people in the eye and raise money when the votes were already cast, ballots cured, and the final election results were in the hands of Colorado's competent Secretary of State - and no amount of money could change them.The race for Colorado's 3rd Congressional District has become the closest election in the nation this year, and folks have been shocked, especially given this district's 9 point Republican advantage. With support from so many of you, my team and I are very proud of the race we ran. It clearly shows a rejection of extremism and a lack of focus by the incumbent on the citizens of Western & Southern Colorado by Democrats, Independents, and Republicans alike.My concession remains sincere but has no legal implications – under no circumstances did I want it to stop (which it legally cannot) this recount of votes. If, by some slight chance, there is a big enough vote swing to put us in the lead after the recount, we would be certified the winner and sworn into congress on January 3rd. But the reality is we do not expect the results of this election to change with the recount.In the meantime, plans for the recount are being finalized today by each of the 27 counties in the district. I will keep you updated on the progress and share the information we have with you, but at this time, we can expect the results of the recount no later than December 13th.Thank you for keeping the faith, for your support throughout this campaign, and for believing in the democratic processes that define our country.With gratitude – Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado

name: Team AOC
subject: Action today: Call your Senators and stand with railway workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It’s time to call your Senators.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221201-3669-header&t=1&akid=3669%2E2526796%2Eqp-yre)
On Monday, President Biden asked Congress to intervene on a looming railroad workers strike. Management and labor had struck a deal in September, but more than half of the unions voted against it because the agreement only included one day of paid sick leave. Despite that, the President asked the House to pass the agreement without any changes.
**But at the request of the unions, Alexandria and progressives fought tooth and nail for an amended agreement that included 7 days of paid leave** and leadership was forced to bring it to the floor. Yesterday, the agreement **_and_** the amendment with 7 days paid sick time passed in the House of Representatives. Our union brothers, sisters, and siblings applauded the effort.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15235?source=em20221201-3669-P_ENG_RES_LAB&t=2&akid=3669%2E2526796%2Eqp-yre)
**But our fight is not over. Today, we have a narrow window for a full pressure campaign to get our Senators on board.** [Can you take a few minutes today to call your Senators and urge them to support paid sick leave for railway workers?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15235?source=em20221201-3669-P_ENG_RES_LAB&t=3&akid=3669%2E2526796%2Eqp-yre)
**[CALL YOUR SENATORS AND ASK THEM TO SUPPORT RAILWAY WORKERS TODAY](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15235?source=em20221201-3669-P_ENG_RES_LAB&t=4&akid=3669%2E2526796%2Eqp-yre)**
Railroad workers grind themselves to the bone for this country as their labor produces billions for Wall Street. If Congress intervenes, it should be to have workers’ backs and secure their demands in legislation.
Let’s get these sick days,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20221201-3669-P_ENG_RES_LAB&t=5&refcode2=3669_2526796_qp-yre&akid=3669%2E2526796%2Eqp-yre)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221201-3669-P_ENG_RES_LAB&t=6&akid=3669%2E2526796%2Eqp-yre)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=3669%2E2526796%2Eqp-yre) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=3669%2E2526796%2Eqp-yre) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=3669%2E2526796%2Eqp-yre)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

But with your support of the **AMERICAFEST SCHOLARSHIP FUND** , we can bring EVEN MORE young Americans to this life-changing event and help them rediscover their love for our country. Whether you're able to help sponsor ONE STUDENT for $50 ... TWO STUDENTS for $100 ... THREE STUDENTS for $150 ... or to contribute to this important event with another amount, YOUR SUPPORT will make a powerful difference to our success.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24ef221cc0c64306935ac29823cc468c&_e=dfAX8-BiHEd_0UpjVp4BXYMsTk-G44bZqMAU0a09zEdAHljj0DcwoNpZcylHPhu3EDaOxnvG69buOiPGgr5FRYgZZlpO0IUPSDa770TBt8N7QlhEHPnelkRMGoIUrbi4KgV8b9V1yMfeGYNHNP-h2cyzwNBvRaDty-y_qGyDocl0611di8ZihxiUxO_niuS0SzBxVTjNR6VeZ67Dk8Sbwdb7Oez7RAEZnAyyxe-YB0B8EosSOb9sqgM67ztxc2PDpw27EGLs_R2DGPf1f3n7wsoCtjhbjsmU6z6_mFuDPgCf6A0gHKJm_8NmayvTjs5I)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99ce863e55294aa5ba8297bc9ddb64b9&_e=FBkAPQIwoSbrsY5_Ui5WOWc6WZdVCxculQ3AtU1-jEN97yhIHoS1hpOrWoo1EBFlSqihdOBnYCDq8ymowlXCk66fYil_P6EH08CGqhu24LfH8JbfbfIzo6SCjvffTjXMdS_UChvNHGdW1rJsF1ZvabyWiKKFAVw9hZ2AsL87ActCFCSwtE4vVSKo7Ya8ap64MSE2mYP5f6FoNxYaaCT4z19ZONJQLoDmqu-36FCEIP_W7f7UNmVeHLe6vWF2IJgwPe8pOQDEAEJ7XmyAZ8pAsjb_3Ejc1lXZRVTUceSA1Dn2u7bH27RjOCGOsE8_Rc76)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99ce863e55294aa5ba8297bc9ddb64b9&_e=FBkAPQIwoSbrsY5_Ui5WOWc6WZdVCxculQ3AtU1-jEN97yhIHoS1hpOrWoo1EBFlSqihdOBnYCDq8ymowlXCk66fYil_P6EH08CGqhu24LfH8JbfbfIzo6SCjvffTjXMdS_UChvNHGdW1rJsF1Zvaa_DjsgKxf3VNxEn_rvGiiD6bcPh4thYvhFrXJzeQYAHgFfU6JnCv0dLar0n5Titp5Nz9uQLWdAk3FBanEdKjVkl6agDZcoxqmnlKb_CfZ0RAOrfhtwBxJN8JX7u7pzz5EhT1DkGYkzHXOXnuR2rtzrWIDCK7qYy1Jdtp2CUd0Hx)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99ce863e55294aa5ba8297bc9ddb64b9&_e=FBkAPQIwoSbrsY5_Ui5WOWc6WZdVCxculQ3AtU1-jEN97yhIHoS1hpOrWoo1EBFlSqihdOBnYCDq8ymowlXCk66fYil_P6EH08CGqhu24LfH8JbfbfIzo6SCjvffTjXMdS_UChvNHGdW1rJsF1ZvaeCN8UOnG0P-cfcp2gfm_F4st3MoSFHIhVUccX62orboWP-DsNFBlgYfG5Ek12BXaLu8xGIPVZEsduNQjCGJgbLu3JquDP-79rjBTATpLS1OzCmVYaxiSFsiKkaq6-Dr2-ew4RqZe6eTSAeVyOuCIjZS52svoW_t2pm_bUthv4e_)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99ce863e55294aa5ba8297bc9ddb64b9&_e=FBkAPQIwoSbrsY5_Ui5WOWc6WZdVCxculQ3AtU1-jEN97yhIHoS1hpOrWoo1EBFlSqihdOBnYCDq8ymowlXCk66fYil_P6EH08CGqhu24LfH8JbfbfIzo6SCjvffTjXMdS_UChvNHGdW1rJsF1ZvaXNq1Cvv3sUY22gcD7bVC5MbvDI8l613YKMXAYIDdtT-UjGmRYmvCEtM9msCLfOwf-VsX0hOd5dyrHXjOMeCkY4Htx3GeoG234SmZdjxz4b_aFQ9-gVscc_tmxb_AgPw2Dx-xaATQZ9u5z5l8H_VcIgnJ2Iw0dLOVYATEyv7LUCQ)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... name: =?utf-8?Q?Solidarity=20Strategies?=
subject: Solidarity Strategies is proud to announce Daysi Gonzalez as our newest partner!
body:
Solidarity Strategies is proud to announce Daysi Gonzalez has earned a well-deserved promotion to Partner effective December 1. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/unidosusaf/solidarity-strategies-is-proud-to-announce-daysi-gonzalez-as-our-newest-partner?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Solidarity Strategies is proud to announce Daysi Gonzalez has earned a well-deserved promotion to Partner effective December 1! Daysi will join the leadership team of our political and public affairs firm made up of Luis Alcauter, partner, and Chuck Rocha, founder. Solidarity will now be one of the only national consulting firms completely run by Latino immigrants.

Daysi joined the firm four years ago and has advanced through progressively more responsible positions in both managing day-to-day operations and providing excellent service to our clients.

Daysi immigrated to the US with her family at six years old. Daysi is a TPS recipient and the true embodiment of the American dream. Daysi attended BYU-Idaho where she completed a bachelor's degree in Public Relations. Daysi lives in Virginia with her sister, Astrid, and their disabled dog Nemo.
---
| | | | | | | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=11d1ffe63a&e=b8f90417f9)

subject: Georgia On My Mind!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Thanks to the work of countless volunteers in Georgia and across the country, we are on the verge of re-electing Reverend Warnock to the U.S. Senate. But we’re not there yet. In order to be successful on December 6th, we need YOU to take action - making phone calls, helping to organize communities across the state, and protecting the vote.

Want to make calls in these final 5 days? From now through December 6th, Georgia Votes will be hosting daily phone banks, encouraging Georgians to get out and vote in the runoff election. [Click here to sign up](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=31317be843&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and keep Georgia Blue!

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31a61810520d45e2836380345416aead&_e=KXE0pxmyVfcqWb4FGnK7OLFslH04MZT2KIY-2hLmn0GcNudF1XYkgmcH9JVC4nOncEDh0P9D9V4M7UZ2XtgbijnGYZeSVxC8Rndvg_yi4Yb90P9mQtWr4I-pCDdoEzoA7Zs0ow8R6jvTBhaLbJlS23-Qi1zu1KGg8JZ8zcsPYQELEXTesjKdiGdFP8dyV50qMMg3uCZfJonkA04HjFrsVG3fKawiJwv4QwrzitCAkMc8zinNYCQ63T-Nz9rJnThX8DLJOhIkyk5t3b3f5g-gWF1CvxMyWR8HjxKUxZA3XiGZ4UT2DTbuH29IIBvFKV197hq0NRwWhKZHH2OwNvFkTWUNRCInaAkuIPcVkv9x7VHKVgEzhq3ZmHnPw5B9tGMiwCx5exAqaaSnolS7q0DA1w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31a61810520d45e2836380345416aead&_e=KXE0pxmyVfcqWb4FGnK7OLFslH04MZT2KIY-2hLmn0GcNudF1XYkgmcH9JVC4nOncEDh0P9D9V4M7UZ2XtgbijnGYZeSVxC8Rndvg_yi4Yb90P9mQtWr4I-pCDdoEzoA7Zs0ow8R6jvTBhaLbJlS23-Qi1zu1KGg8JZ8zcsPYQELEXTesjKdiGdFP8dyV50qMMg3uCZfJonkA04HjFrsVG3fKawiJwv4QwrzitCAkMc8zinNYCQ63T-Nz9rJnThXjd7ZyIwwPwiwwCBoEFoftxAmkGgH0IrkzaScTq-Fhg1lqIKNfxGDpK6-cxBvlMFwfAmLK3zNJPEzjR4IEa1WxtThxarXNAPTPJy-qkrBWClR4EUpLWQioNafhpSutnqnqKZVV-BFcdnPZgv9ZhCQHg%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31a61810520d45e2836380345416aead&_e=KXE0pxmyVfcqWb4FGnK7OLFslH04MZT2KIY-2hLmn0GcNudF1XYkgmcH9JVC4nOncEDh0P9D9V4M7UZ2XtgbijnGYZeSVxC8Rndvg_yi4Yb90P9mQtWr4I-pCDdoEzoA7Zs0ow8R6jvTBhaLbJlS23-Qi1zu1KGg8JZ8zcsPYQELEXTesjKdiGdFP8dyV50qMMg3uCZfJonkA04HjFrsVG3fKawiJwv4QwrzitCAkMc8zinNYCQ63T-Nz9rJnThXnMLt_FHIjnI-coY0_d0KGNNceoxytJ5qjm6NLpkZ7Yu-OQFBanwtZFBDHa1FdQ2WpnKxv_Io8qMIYCwXoOj_qVJFjcayjb-o2GTD76OaacuVXfpCCEBbilikXBtrjCb4kqsqxtIok0dPOLpK2mUn2w%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Herschel Walker HQ
subject: Guess who’s coming back to Georgia, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

**Former President Barack Obama is coming back to stump for Senator Raphael Warnock in Georgia's Senate runoff TODAY.**

Obama's visit will create a lot of buzz and excitement with Democrat voters, so we need YOUR HELP to build our own momentum.

**[Watch a message from Herschel Walker and Lindsey Graham:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62001234:6y5Ul2GNR:m:1:3331703221:102A36EE8599932E94E4FD714D595411:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62001234:6y5Ul2GNR:m:1:3331703221:102A36EE8599932E94E4FD714D595411:r)

**We will beat Obama.
We will beat Warnock.
We will save America!**
But we cannot do these things without your help. **[Will you help us raise an additional $10,000 before the Obama rally with Raphael Warnock tonight?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62001234:6y5Ul2GNR:m:1:3331703221:102A36EE8599932E94E4FD714D595411:r)**

**[Every little bit helps. We must show Barack Obama, Raphael Warnock, and the Democrats we have the ground game to win.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62001234:6y5Ul2GNR:m:1:3331703221:102A36EE8599932E94E4FD714D595411:r)**

Thanks,

Team Herschel

P.S. Last time President Obama was in Georgia, he rallied 7,000 voters and got wall-to-wall tv coverage for Raphael Warnock in the final days of the General Election. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Why do you think Herschel Walker, who's committed acts of deranged violence against numerous women, can barely form a coherent sentence and has lies splashing out of mouth at the rate of a fire hose even has a chance in this election?
body:
Question for you ...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb978f38f-af9f-467e-86ea-2484a7594874/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, Look guys, I'm going to be straight you. [I really need you to subscribe to my Blue Amp channel on Youtube, where we expose the lies and cruelty of The Right in America everyday, and counter-message so our side has a fighting chance.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79460642-7559-4386-9237-36bec22e3492/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We had a great election, we overcame so many structural barriers from voter suppression to Republican gerrymandering, or in layman's terms: Cheating. But we're up against a leviathan. **Both right-wing media, and its wimpy, battered cousin, "both sides" mainstream media (MSM), so tilt the playing field in favor of those willing to lie, cheat or steal--who would do anything necessary to win and destroy the opposition--that it's hard to truly explain the breadth of it. ** [**PLEASE SUBSCRIBE TO THE BLUE AMP CHANNEL!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td544c370-f8cd-4d37-a06d-bcd00a32b66a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Why do you think Herschel Walker, who's committed acts of deranged violence against numerous women, can barely form a coherent sentence and has lies splashing out of mouth at the rate of a fire hose even has a chance in this election? It's because right-wing media lies about him, and both sides MSM refuses to tell the truth--which is he's wholly unqualified to hold this office (note: As I say often, there are incredible MSM exceptions who've broken the both-sides mold, damn the consequences. But they, sadly, are the exception.)_ **The NY Times, CNN, Time Magazine...they are not on our side. They want ratings.** Reporters want promotions for toeing the party line. What this does is create every incentive for Republicans to lie and cheat, because they know there's no penalty for it--both sides will always be equally as guilty to the MSM. I was once a graduate student heading towards a PhD in American History, concentrating on the Rise of The Right. I have the stories etched in my head where conservative foundations and billionaires poured millions into an immense and shadowy network of think tanks, print outlets, talk radio, right-wing TV and much more. It's virtually unparalleled in world history, and now they've gone global by corrupting the conversation on Facebook, Twitter and other social media outlets. **They even get help from dictators abroad--Putin, Erdogan, Orban, MBS, Xi--who know they benefit from the corruption, incompetence and tolerance for, or even promotion of cruelty that defines today's GOP.** [**PLEASE SUBSCRIBE TO THE BLUE AMP CHANNEL!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0944e4fb-3de0-486d-80c1-ddee2066269b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I don't just know this academically. I debated then-NRA super-lobbyist Chris Cox in the pages of Tucker Carlson's Daily Caller (before I was banned). I debated Sean Hannity on FoxNews (before I was banned--seeing a pattern?) I was the paid "liberal"analyst at the uber-right-wing Sinclair Broadcast Network that owns local television stations around the country. I even wrote an expose of my experience there for the NY Times: I work within this leviathan when it's to our advantage, but realized **as our media has continued to get worse: [WE. MUST. START. AND. EXPAND. OUR. OWN. CHANNELS.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd74aabd-f487-45c9-b4b3-df19964edcab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [This is what I am doing at Youtube. I'm nearing 10,000 subscribers in 6 months](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88790d31-8e5a-48c9-8556-b17a26a6584d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) (in fact, we are at 9,540 subs at this moment, meaning if 460 of you see this email and subscribe, we'll hit our goal!), and **10K is a magical number on Youtube. It's one of the plateaus where the algorithm takes you more seriously, sharing your content with similar channels, thereby helping you grow much more quickly.** Look, I hadn't planned [to do this](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72957ce1-7aed-4ca1-a33c-87ea97014dd6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). But I've always felt comfortable in front of a screen and have had a knack for messaging. [We must fight this information war on every front, so I ask that you please subscribe. I am confident you will be entertained, you will learn some things and you will become fired up even more to fight for our democracy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa4cfe77-61ac-4713-8d49-1d261aace267/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for being on the Blue Amp Action List, so we can fight for our democracy together. [Now please do the same at the Blue Amp Channel, where it doesn't cost a cent to subscribe, and watching my videos only helps us fight and win the battles that MUST be fought.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdac2a6f-7a47-4e2c-a89e-3fa2a8b18242/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** In solidarity, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb013320e-be84-4df4-aaa6-24ba788a5b6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Why do you think Herschel Walker, who's committed acts of deranged violence against numerous women, can barely form a coherent sentence and has lies splashing out of mouth at the rate of a fire hose even has a chance in this election? It's because right-wing media lies about him, and both sides MSM refuses to tell the truth--which is he's wholly unqualified to hold this office (note: As I say often, there are incredible MSM exceptions who've broken the both-sides mold, damn the consequences. But they, sadly, are the exception.) The NY Times, CNN, Time Magazine...they are not on our side. They want ratings. Reporters want promotions for toeing the party line. What this does is create every incentive for Republicans to lie and cheat, because they know there's no penalty for it--both sides will always be equally as guilty to the MSM. I was once a graduate student heading towards a PhD in American History, concentrating on the Rise of The Right. I have the stories etched in my head where conservative foundations and billionaires poured millions into an immense and shadowy network of think tanks, print outlets, talk radio, right-wing TV and much more. It's virtually unparalleled in world history, and now they've gone global by corrupting the conversation on Facebook, Twitter and other social media outlets. They even get help from dictators abroad--Putin, Erdogan, Orban, MBS, Xi--who know they benefit from the corruption, incompetence and tolerance for, or even promotion of cruelty that defines today's GOP. I don't just know this academically. I debated then-NRA super-lobbyist Chris Cox in the pages of Tucker Carlson's Daily Caller (before I was banned). I debated Sean Hannity on FoxNews (before I was banned--seeing a pattern?) I was the paid "liberal"analyst at the uber-right-wing Sinclair Broadcast Network that owns local television stations around the country. I even wrote an expose of my experience there for the NY Times: I work within this leviathan when it's to our advantage, but realized as our media has continued to get worse: (in fact, we are at 9,540 subs at this moment, meaning if 460 of you see this email and subscribe, we'll hit our goal!), and 10K is a magical number on Youtube. It's one of the plateaus where the algorithm takes you more seriously, sharing your content with similar channels, thereby helping you grow much more quickly. Look, I hadn't planned . But I've always felt comfortable in front of a screen and have had a knack for messaging. Thank you for being on the Blue Amp Action List, so we can fight for our democracy together. In solidarity, Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Katie Porter
subject: What’s next for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15513%2E3422442%2E-cUvhR)
Derek,
In January, Republicans will control a slim House majority and Congress is going to look a bit different. But my goal isn’t changing. No matter who controls Congress or is in the White House, **my plan is to use whatever mechanisms I have to get things done for the people of California.**
And as a member of the Oversight Committee, that means overseeing the government and holding power to account, no matter who is in charge.
Even though we don’t hold the House majority, I hope to see our party lead the fight to lower costs for families and strengthen the economy. There’s so much at stake, and I’m ready to get to work.
Onwards,
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE01_CON_20221201_V1_F&t=2&akid=15513%2E3422442%2E-cUvhR)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I was just on stage with President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
**President Obama and I just stepped off the rally stage here in Georgia.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55423017/381639092/-696062415?refcode=EM_FR_221201PostRally_FR_RRF_90DO_G_N_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDIzNTZiZS1kZTcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZNRmaRKpgiqUft2-2FuC2vJT_xUo1JEDn_Z-1HcxmVE=)** If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **In 5 days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**

But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.

They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical Rally Day goal before midnight tonight. **I’m asking:**[**Will you please split $10 – or whatever you can between me and Lisa Blunt Rochester – so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55423018/381639093/1203984151?refcode=EM_FR_221201PostRally_FR_RRF_90DO_G_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDIzNTZiZS1kZTcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZNRmaRKpgiqUft2-2FuC2vJT_xUo1JEDn_Z-1HcxmVE=) Thank you so much for all you do.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock ** ** ** ** ** ** Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/_6DeEby01kOvxTWj8qzW6A2?unsubscribedata=h24EXs2X5gvKNbRWNay9tzLdR5eG2z8TIDvlor5yJCOCekzPpYlKKyflXEczsUgh9GwaI2HPlg6exHtcQ3A%2BWArE%2BUyKWx9Y%2BiQO9Ro0H92%2B89deHpqxdPqqvi9vv1CJuDqKoJWuqefUo3%2BpW%2F2TxgSsPzU6sMgjP25Yi6hXFKcTicXODJTEchvQ%2FrDD9zg528GCp3D80OcOz2VbO3Sx6Trq107qC6UXtKZyh17mx72Hj5%2BfkstHDFcUPLEJEUgFs2%2BO3aihIRp1fCKa1frjK2G%2FICRGSa52yyLK7LBM63eZ2SWXBTVDFYguusKTxnc2kn1iE4qKSWSUqpyb9f0ekAP2i7VJJTMEMxlaAwQ7AwMhhjOSxeyQkxoslYoLLZXenyiNbExISkStywiY2U7cNcAHFozAxsbVBPs57mZbDEqN%2BKeMqnzgunC0jGCk%2BrhG). ** **

name: Harriet Hageman

Friend,
I just returned home from Washington, DC, where I attended New Member Orientation. Our new Republican Majority in the House has a host of issues to tackle. The Democrats have tanked our economy, gutted our energy industry, and destroyed our border. I want to hear from you. Harriet Hageman
