Our new Republican Majority in the House has a host of issues to tackle. The Democrats have tanked our economy, gutted our energy industry, and destroyed our border. I want to hear from you. | The American people have trusted the Republican Party to turn this country around and we do not take this responsibility lightly. We are working for YOU, and we want to hear feedback from our constituents. Thank you, Harriet Hageman | | | | |

Friend, it’s Herschel Walker. I know you’re busy, so I’ll be quick.

It’s official. Nikki Haley was right—Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we’re not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He’s weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we’re quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bc7bf8ff001142b3822d998d5c753801&_e=FLzL_vWnPyMFomtmlTCfqBhx0-MjrOS5CJ96UbBAWHpD2ZLxIGi0yxSfTGbMl4OW_63dDOv5xgXxh6EUrpGXzGmUnOP7zwvKElmr5mtSQOTNH2a78JKtpQEtTSvtsVEbxgYZ8O57V2ubPIHwYf0ihf4WawJMaEOiCBU1uiS2utbVxaBAFjIeBjw17VHC5UOcymSlHqzkQTKm_VDPTvgfxSGt0YeZ7_3yYOQ7zcPDXWuLa0Six811BaTWtE7D4jWMIN-3nWk6F3ejhtDnPSRtXvUACr2T4iAn8lvtoeMC_VsvN6NlvfJp5hl0P31G1Z-A-3VYx15CUUCy6ACMIIXkM9kV3a1jxPe50wTvkCMzr_ve5HSwXYVBfcmZxNZcNEJjzYrydRFGZom0jIa0zdyPCA0lou8Jz7sne96zfZ16dyE5boguwXG71d10JmyY8aCzOE5pP7BJHq1c55QF89AyjLnLKOoFBtff5t4Kjy6CQB6eiMguWY4u_rS31eKploisCDUEUI97_LbwhtiVqVR6OZjuelmiU_bSMXPGpD3dbC90hi6GlNkqFRBDFVGJF_nRDDBQ05hn42hbZLLb8Kiqf42170-ad1LH6KXJv6iq7Vo%3D "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_

clean_body: America can’t handle this loss | | | | | | | | | | Friend, it’s Herschel Walker. I know you’re busy, so I’ll be quick. It’s official. Nikki Haley was right—Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6. Once again, it all comes down to Georgia. Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we’re not going to let history repeat itself. If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He’s weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we’re quickly running out of time. My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Democrats are already salivating about the liberal policies Raphael Warnock will help them pass in a Democrat-led Senate. You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Friend? I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, "so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?" | | | | To victory, Herschel Walker U.S. Senate Candidate | | Paid for by Stand for America PAC. body:
Can Katie count on you to help our friend Herschel? | | |
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=fc3cc7c5a8a44f2f99198e9fcb24cbe3&_e=Jcy9EhKWbl_UBMxJIj9V99Ar3jt7lGytPaOeR0k5SqD0jL0JYNpHLpWb8S0aOrzPRkK-ge1vknyQCQcT8nvBzfSnUlAqhRGgbvNqsII13byTGkLFu77CanRQrVCkClhY9rtwXBJ83iTfW-2fY1eUMlS9qd2x0J7pvItDD0DuuKRBXu_ExRxS10psRrpnKmFk5S3Q7Qt67wP2rYnskP4SPThPQ8fHbwrFXAONlCAesd-7oRcGNgFTAmlEcV_oZJKTXPI9nlFstsAaD_mEtKB2GnmKvFJM3fAUlBSOFR3JhrqTieYnF083mnmauL6FSXDlWCLju4EKUouq_LZWtGOzdJ2-WnpV8c4XZPcGqp-Qk0ZglE1M2VQ-2fDC7NTPogQSthCRxEpLBAXSS4ZmtDV5NDrpE2rCBaoxEIEpfWvYptI%3D)
---
Peter, the runoff election in Georgia is just 5 days away, and Republican momentum is hanging in the balance. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today, to tell you why we need to step up our efforts. Herschel Walker is a conservative fighter who’s ready to fight back hard against Biden’s big government socialist agenda. Our economy is tanking, our founding principles are under attack, and Americans are struggling to provide for their families... It's time for the nonsense to stop. Every seat we gain puts us closer to securing America’s future, and Herschel Walker can’t win this runoff election without [**_all_**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=fc3cc7c5a8a44f2f99198e9fcb24cbe3&_e=Jcy9EhKWbl_UBMxJIj9V99Ar3jt7lGytPaOeR0k5SqD0jL0JYNpHLpWb8S0aOrzPRkK-ge1vknyQCQcT8nvBzfSnUlAqhRGgbvNqsII13byTGkLFu77CanRQrVCkClhY9rtwXBJ83iTfW-2fY1eUMlS9qd2x0J7pvItDD0DuuKRBXu_ExRxS10psRrpnKmFk5S3Q7Qt67wP2rYnskP4SPThPQ8fHbwrFXAONlCAesd-7oRcGNgFTAmlEcV_oZJKTXPI9nlFstsAaD_mEtKB2Gnqi-5ASgI2QjHUgf-rfoPSlf-BkXEjUItoOAn6KEjvkg9yjcAQ0ryUfp5RqxI0fKlCr0XBwcRkM58ThkkguVTF-syCdS7UI7uO5I5E5MfJokL8NmaZgK4cp1944BhI0xaufBsFVbZPmMAo948j2ezI%3D) of our help. With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:_[Will you split $25 or more right now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55401200/381589594/1583625711?refcode=20221201.4_RW_A31&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzhjOTU4MS1iNjcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AcFSfLKv4iu859ZIUF3imVQNq_u-n2wreOIPzjcMJw=)_**

body:
Let's keep making progress together.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/x4r9SXp0_Xsy/U2p0RFNnZklwN20zdGU0YTJObnBWdnhTRDdBMjZJbzdNM2JaSzVVZk9sOTh0dUZDNi9nczh0QVpHTndkWjRhVHRWWTJNajhzUWxuZ3ZOZk1DVzR6VWRZWWp2Q0cxU1ZoamFBK3VBUHNYdVE9S0/YjlYVGI0a09BcHdLNGNkYTAyaS9pVjVoZ3dTckJUOWo0QjBKYnBWaVNuQT0S1) Friend -- The goal I set for November's end-of-month deadline was ambitious: 1,000 donations. **But thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, I am proud to share that we reached it -- together.** **THANK YOU!** I truly couldn't do this work without you. So, as we look ahead to Washington state's upcoming legislative session and the fundraising freeze that comes with it, I want to hear from you: What issues are most important to you as we prepare for our state's legislative session? [**_Please, take a minute to respond to my short priorities survey. It 's just one question, so it will take just a moment and the results couldn't be more important to me!_**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/8EW3hwZe2wB0/U2p0RFNnZklwN20zdGU0YTJObnBWdnhTRDdBMjZJbzdNM2JaSzVVZk9sOTh0dUZDNi9nczh0QVpHTndkWjRhVHRWWTJNajhzUWxuZ3ZOZk1DVzR6VWRZWWp2Q0cxU1ZoamFBK3VBUHNYdVE9S0/YjlYVGI0a09BcHdLNGNkYTAyaS9pVjVoZ3dTckJUOWo0QjBKYnBWaVNuQT0S1) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/9bq3hRjD~RhP/U2p0RFNnZklwN20zdGU0YTJObnBWdnhTRDdBMjZJbzdNM2JaSzVVZk9sOTh0dUZDNi9nczh0QVpHTndkWjRhVHRWWTJNajhzUWxuZ3ZOZk1DVzR6VWRZWWp2Q0cxU1ZoamFBK3VBUHNYdVE9S0/YjlYVGI0a09BcHdLNGNkYTAyaS9pVjVoZ3dTckJUOWo0QjBKYnBWaVNuQT0S1)
---
This past Election Day, Washington state voters gave us a mandate to lead with our values: We will fight against the climate crisis; we will protect the right to a safe, accessible abortion; and we will fight to protect the sanctity of our democracy.
But I know that, as important as those three issues are, there are so many pressing priorities that each of us hold dear as we look to the future of our state, our country, and the world.
[**_So, I want to hear from you. Will you take my one-question priorities survey on which issues matter most to you as we head into this critical legislative session?_**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/8EW3hwZe2wB0/U2p0RFNnZklwN20zdGU0YTJObnBWdnhTRDdBMjZJbzdNM2JaSzVVZk9sOTh0dUZDNi9nczh0QVpHTndkWjRhVHRWWTJNajhzUWxuZ3ZOZk1DVzR6VWRZWWp2Q0cxU1ZoamFBK3VBUHNYdVE9S0/YjlYVGI0a09BcHdLNGNkYTAyaS9pVjVoZ3dTckJUOWo0QjBKYnBWaVNuQT0S1)
Let's keep making progress together.
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Friend, President Obama and I just stepped off the rally stage here in Georgia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
**Friend, President Obama and I just stepped off the rally stage here in Georgia.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55423262/381642518/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2276-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViOGMwOC1lNTcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlk_YSzUvb0luX2vILgPK1X2Nr1Aq2xOQtMX_GaXYzY=)
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **In 5 days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**
But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than **$58 MILLION** to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical Rally Day goal before midnight tonight.
**Friend, I’m asking:[Will you please split $5 – or whatever you can afford – between me and Jacky Rosen so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55423264/381642527/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2276-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTViOGMwOC1lNTcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlk_YSzUvb0luX2vILgPK1X2Nr1Aq2xOQtMX_GaXYzY=)**
Thank you so much for all you do, friend.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

subject: All eyes are on Georgia

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000283:JsxSE2G2N:m:1:3374012347:F26B20839E401CAE33A93D07CF7501C5:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000283:JsxSE2G2N:m:1:3374012347:F26B20839E401CAE33A93D07CF7501C5:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000284:JsxSE2G2N:m:1:3374012347:F26B20839E401CAE33A93D07CF7501C5:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000283:JsxSE2G2N:m:1:3374012347:F26B20839E401CAE33A93D07CF7501C5:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000283:JsxSE2G2N:m:1:3374012347:F26B20839E401CAE33A93D07CF7501C5:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000283:JsxSE2G2N:m:1:3374012347:F26B20839E401CAE33A93D07CF7501C5:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

body:
This moment matters.
| | |
---
Friend, President Obama is about to take the rally stage to get voters across Georgia fired up to reelect Rev. Warnock.
**President Obama is ALL IN to win – but we’re still falling short of our $1 million pre-rally goal.[Please take a stand with Rev. Warnock and chip in $5 before President Obama takes the stage so we can keep Georgia blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55405280/381593731/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5229-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDIyNmEyMC1iYjcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ItVUkq_62L1H1c6fe0dCWKFzTPz7s1-Geu_sApNkz0k=)**
The GOP is spending MILLIONS to flood the airwaves with nasty attack ads and drown out our people-powered message. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could lose this race and our chance to expand our Senate majority.
But while our GOP opponent Herschel Walker is counting on his shady megadonors to try and buy this seat, Rev. Warnock is running a 100% people-powered campaign that relies on support from folks like you.
**[That’s why Rev. IL GOP Chair Don Tracy’s Family-Owned Business Donated to Biden, ‘Never Trumpers’ (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-family-owned-business-donated-to-biden-never-trumpers.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

They say a picture is worth a thousand words, but political donations can tell a story too. Over the last six years, IL GOP Chair Don Tracy's family-owned business has made some political donations that tell an interesting story. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-family-owned-business-donated-to-biden-never-trumpers.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Twitter Poll: 93% Favor a New IL GOP Chairman, 7% Oppose (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/twitter-poll-93-favor-a-new-il-gop-chairman-7-oppose.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The poll is a sampling of the feelings of conservative grassroots activists across the state who were devastated by the losses during the Nov. 8th election, despite promises from IL GOP leadership that a red wave was approaching and that we would see major victories on election night. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/twitter-poll-93-favor-a-new-il-gop-chairman-7-oppose.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/twitter-poll-93-favor-a-new-il-gop-chairman-7-oppose.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

FL. Rep. Byron Donalds to IL GOP Elite: You Don't Win Elections (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/fl-rep-byron-donalds-to-il-gop-elite-you-dont-win-elections.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Speaking to a room full of the inner-most circle of the IL GOP this past Monday, Congressman Byron Donalds (FL-19, R) said to win races, Illinois Republicans must engage with diverse communities and younger voters. “Those who are in the room do not win elections,” Rep. Donalds said. “To win elections, you need those who are not in the room.” Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/fl-rep-byron-donalds-to-il-gop-elite-you-dont-win-elections.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/fl-rep-byron-donalds-to-il-gop-elite-you-dont-win-elections.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Source: Uihlein Camp 'Mortified' After Spending $50M for IL Gov Race to be Called Minutes After Polls Closing (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/source-uihlein-camp-mortified-after-spending-50m-for-il-gov-race-to-be-called-minutes-after-polls-closed.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
After Illinois Republicans suffered massive losses on election night, including a governor’s race that was called within minutes of the polls closing, sources confirm to Illinois Review that members within conservative billionaire Richard Uihlein’s inner circle are left “mortified” by the election results. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/source-uihlein-camp-mortified-after-spending-50m-for-il-gov-race-to-be-called-minutes-after-polls-closed.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/source-uihlein-camp-mortified-after-spending-50m-for-il-gov-race-to-be-called-minutes-after-polls-closed.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Embattled IL GOP Chair Don Tracy Becomes Distraction as Names Surface to Replace Him (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/embattled-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-becomes-distraction-as-names-surface-to-replace-him.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Several names have surfaced in the last week as potential candidates to replace Tracy, including state central committee member for the 8th District, Dean White; state central committee member for the 15th District, State Sen. Jason Plummer, 54th District; Will County grassroots activist, businesswoman and founder of the 10,000-plus member Illinois Patriots group Christina Clausen; former US Senate candidate Peggy Hubbard; and businessman and former candidate for governor Gary Rabine. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/embattled-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-becomes-distraction-as-names-surface-to-replace-him.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IL GOP Leaders Roasted by Conservative Grassroots over Thanksgiving Weekend (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/il-gop-leaders-roasted-by-conservative-grassroots-over-thanksgiving-weekend.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

While families sat around the Thanksgiving table sharing what they were grateful for, IL GOP leaders spent the holiday weekend rallying around embattled chairman Don Tracy – expressing their gratitude for his leadership this past election. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/il-gop-leaders-roasted-by-conservative-grassroots-over-thanksgiving-weekend.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Power vs. The People:
The Arrogance of IL GOP Despite Massive Losses (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/power-vs-the-people-the-arrogance-of-the-il-gop-despite-massive-losses.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b12a278043-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_01_08_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b12a278043-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we're going to succeed, and in order to do that, we need to provide them with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts. If you would like to It's because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU Peter that we will WIN BIG in 2022!

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: new territory

body:
I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment.

Team: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. **Here's why:**
* FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win.

* BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election.

* **NOW, we need _all hands on deck_ to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short.**

**So much is at stake. We got to this point without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment.**
[**Please, will you rush a donation of $3 or more right now to split between me and Peter Welch so we can defeat Walker and keep Georgia blue?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5272?t=2&akid=1215%2E61531%2EbhNhEw)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000304:6NWpV2GjN:m:1:3374627611:B633C65FFBD1E78C561ACACD9D35BC6F:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000305:6NWpV2GjN:m:1:3374627611:B633C65FFBD1E78C561ACACD9D35BC6F:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000304:6NWpV2GjN:m:1:3374627611:B633C65FFBD1E78C561ACACD9D35BC6F:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000304:6NWpV2GjN:m:1:3374627611:B633C65FFBD1E78C561ACACD9D35BC6F:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62000304:6NWpV2GjN:m:1:3374627611:B633C65FFBD1E78C561ACACD9D35BC6F:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

body:
McCarthy responds to race for speakership and more | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=f6564bbe3b&u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c6922de1a2)

## Happy Thanksgiving
Hope everyone had a great Thanksgiving with their family and friends. Through the holiday season, we will be only doing Monday episodes of “Beyond The Briefing,” keeping you up to date on the biggest 5 stories of the week. On Monday’s episode we talked about Ye’s dinner at Mar-A-Lago, the upcoming runoff in Georgia, the escalating protests in China, the implications of the US Iran soccer match and of course a round up of the media.
| [Subscribe here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5f7f7f96d3&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
## Can we get a fact check on this...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=347602493a&e=f6564bbe3b)
|

## Stories I’m reading...
[Cicilline withdraws, clearing path for Clyburn to remain in leadership](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9f33ad2e8d&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The HillClyburn’s path was cleared when Rep. David Cicilline (D-RI) dropped his competing bid for the assistant leader spot just moments before the closed-door vote. [Jim Jordan renews requests to 4 current and former government officials for information and interviews as House Judiciary Committee investigations take shape ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=60477dc00f&e=f6564bbe3b)— via CNN[Check your 401(k)’s fine print! Because now Biden wants to raid YOURS to fund net zero and ‘diversity.’ But why should his woke agenda put your retirement at risk](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=586c50fa41&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Andy Puzder in Daily Mail[Biden shows little urgency as Dems mull 2024 primary shakeup](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b075957f64&e=f6564bbe3b) — via AP NewsHeads up Iowa... [President JOE BIDEN to visit Arizona semiconductor plant under construction ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1d5e84d0c7&e=f6564bbe3b)— via AZ Central Since he’s out there - maybe a quick swing by the border to check things out? [Colombia asks for legal status for its people already in US](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=83ad3b3fc0&e=f6564bbe3b) — via AP News[Layoffs, low ratings and a lurch closer to the right: is CNN in crisis? ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cddbf06b42&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Yahoo[As rail strike deadline nears, Biden to call on Congress to intervene](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9407dda8e3&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington PostAfter earlier claiming credit for intervening to stop a rail strike, Biden now calls on Congress whose role is entirely unclear. [WHO renames monkeypox as ‘mpox’](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=914ecff3b9&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Hill

Hodges, into law, enshrining legalized same-sex marriage into federal statute. The vote, which needed 60 votes to pass the chamber, got some help from Republicans to get it across the finish line. Here are all the GOP senators [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | #### [ Even The Democrats Can't Stand This Latest Biden Act Even the Democrats can’t stand Biden. As the first state dinner that the President has hosted since taking office arrives, U.S. Democrat Representative Jared Golden is pushing against Biden’s meal choices for the event. Biden plans to serve French President Emmanuel Macron, his wife, and other guests around 200 Maine lobster over events on Wednesday [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | #### [ Nikki Haley to Make Major Decision On Presidential Bid On Tuesday, Nicki Haley announced that she would make decisions on announcing a bid for Presidency over the Christmas Holiday during a speaking event at her alma mater, Clemson University. Haley previously served as UN ambassador for the Trump administration though she resigned in 2018. She had said she would not run for president if [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | ** American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | | | | ---|---|---|---|---

As Houston’s next mayor, Amanda will fight to create economic opportunities for our residents to thrive while ensuring that we have a robust law enforcement team dedicated to community policing and working in ways that preserve trust and keep residents safe.

Amanda is working every day to ensure every Houstonian has a seat at the table when she goes to the Mayor’s office. AAPOL’s endorsement is another sign of the strength of our grassroots movement. But, FIRST/team, to keep up our momentum, we need your help.

The Afro American Police Officers League (AAPOL) just rolled out their support for Amanda’s campaign for Houston mayor! AAPOL knows that Amanda is the leader we need to help tackle our rising crime and bring a holistic approach to our public safety. As Houston’s next mayor, Amanda will fight to create economic opportunities for our residents to thrive while ensuring that we have a robust law enforcement team dedicated to community policing and working in ways that preserve trust and keep residents safe. Amanda is working every day to ensure every Houstonian has a seat at the table when she goes to the Mayor’s office. AAPOL’s endorsement is another sign of the strength of our grassroots movement. But, FIRST/team, to keep up our momentum, we need your help. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks for your continued support, Team Edwards Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, Political Advertising paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer Amanda Edwards Campaign PO Box 88228 Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Amanda Edwards, please .

name: Tom Fitton
subject: The Left will not let up!
body:
You have an enormous stake in helping protect the honesty and integrity of American elections...the linchpin of our Republic.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I want to express my sincere appreciation for your commitment to our shared conservative values, and to respect for the rule of law and accountability in government...the hallmarks of Judicial Watch’s work.
Now, as Judicial Watch prepares for a _new year and new attacks_ from the Left, I need to reach out to ask you to renew your support for Judicial Watch today.
[**Can I count on you to make a special contribution to Judicial Watch?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61244&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61244&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

_Judicial Watch continues to make history successfully fighting for the rule of law and the American people 's right to know, while holding corrupt politicians and government officials accountable. _

We owe our accomplishments to the essential support from our members. _They have built on the support that you and others gave us, and helped us make Judicial Watch America 's preeminent government watchdog group again this year_.

_We are all deeply grateful to you for your past support_.

But we're now making our program plans for 2023... _and we need to enlist more committed Americans like you to our cause_.

This planning is critical, and so is your decision to join with us, because it is clear to me that our opponents will not let up one bit in their efforts to “transform” America...and destroy our Republic.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61244&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

For example, we anticipate additional efforts related to our election law enforcement initiatives.

Foremost among them, we are expanding our successful efforts to help preserve honest elections by forcing states to follow federal law and take reasonable steps to clean their voter rolls between elections.

Believe me when I tell you that this is _our country 's very best safeguard against voter fraud_!

And we continue to be the "only game in town" investigating and exposing serious allegations and evidence of _Biden family corruption_!

The Biden administration refuses to follow federal FOIA law, especially when their stonewalling relates to corruption charges...but our team is the _absolute best_ at using the legal system to break through government's unlawful secrecy!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61244&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

[By contributing to Judicial Watch today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61244&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE) will help us plan:

* How aggressively we continue to lead the fights for honest elections;

* How aggressively we pursue all of our current litigation, including our lawsuits exposing the politicized corruption of so many federal government departments and agencies;

* How aggressively we can persist in our litigation and pressure the new Congress to hold Joe Biden and other powerful politicians accountable under the law to the American people.

If you’ll stand with us now, we’ll be better positioned to stand firm in 2023 for the rule of law and our constitutional republic.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61244&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

I urge you to support Judicial Watch today and thank you for joining the fight.

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61244&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

_**Fast-forward three weeks, and new polling shows the RACE IS TIED once again!**_

**Therefore, the old adage about runoff elections is truer now more than ever:**

**Turnout is key.
Turnout is key.
Turnout is key.**

clean_body: Peter - Turnout is key to winning Georgia’s Senate runoff election next Tuesday, December 6 | Peter - Turnout is key to winning Georgia's Senate runoff election next Tuesday, December 6th. Monday, early voting began in all 159 counties across the state, and voters in Georgia are turning out in record numbers: For the general election, we kept Senator Warnock under 50% of the vote - even after he spent over $100 MILLION on his campaign! Out of more than 3.9 million votes that were cast in this race, we were only 0.9% behind him. Fast-forward three weeks, and new polling shows the RACE IS TIED once again! Therefore, the old adage about runoff elections is truer now more than ever: Turnout is key. Turnout is key. Turnout is key. As you know, a strong voter turnout program costs money. I know you're tired of these emails, and we're tired of sending them. But the truth is the money we raise from short notes like this help fund the overwhelming majority of our turnout operation. With just FIVE days remaining until the runoff election, I'm pleading with you to help us turn out more supporters. Georgia is on track to set new early voting recoFREEDOMTRAIN. Since most Democrats prefer to vote early while many Republicans like to vote on Election Day, a majority of the early votes cast were likely for my opponent. With early voting ending TOMORROW, it's critical that we expand our efforts to turn out as many supporters as possible. If ever there were a time to invest in our campaign, it's now. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: re: Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now — knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1410%2E5257348%2EBi9gJS)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.fJ5pfg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221201_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1410%2E5257348%2EBi9gJS)
I’m fired up!
Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now — knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.
But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell’s super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I’m worried that if we don’t fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.**
**That’s why we set an ambitious $2 million fundraising goal — so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before Tuesday, we’re not on track to reach our goal.
**[So, I’m personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between me and Adam Schiff to help us hit our final $2 million goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.fJ5pfg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221201_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1410%2E5257348%2EBi9gJS)**

| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.xLrN8M&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221201_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1410%2E5257348%2EBi9gJS)

subject: Urgent update before President Obama’s rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Great news,
Derek!
President Obama will hold a rally in Georgia tonight to help us keep our
state blue.

I’m feeling fired up, but we have a problem: GOP donors are pouring over
$58 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to tip the scales against us in these
final days.

We need to fight back immediately, or else Georgia's Democratic seat will
be in serious danger. That's why we set an ambitious goal to raise more
than $1 million today — but with midnight rapidly approaching, we're still
falling way short.

I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs,
Derek, so I’m fully relying on
your grassroots support in this make-or-break moment: [ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1932?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20221201_1_1&t=1001&akid=6117%2E1827488%2EgYkEpy ]Will you rush
$10 or more right now to split between me and Tony Evers so

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What we’ve overcome with your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

With your support, we’ve overcome a lot this cycle. Despite millions of
dollars spent by right-wing super PACs like AIPAC against us and our
candidates — we helped every single member of the squad win re-election
and we expanded our bloc by powering Summer Lee and Greg Casar to victory.

BUT...

Money has always been our biggest obstacle. We don’t rely on billionaire
donors or corporate PACs to pick up the slack when fundraising is down, we
rely on thousands of grassroots contributions to keep our organization’s
lights on.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122259?refcode=em20221201-26348&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26348%2E1203867%2EKR61Ei ]Peter, we’re
counting on you to contribute $3 tonight to help us start
out December strong on the fundraising side as we approach candidate
recruitment. Will you rush your gift right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122259?refcode=em20221201-26348&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26348%2E1203867%2EKR61Ei ]Contribute $3

We operate on a pretty tight budget, especially compared to other
political organizations. Our average donation this year is just $18. We’re
proud of that but it also means we need a lot of small-dollar donations to
fund our operations.

We promise to use your donation in the best, most effective way possible.
And we will fight tooth and nail to elect more progressive champions like
AOC to Congress who will work for the people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122259?refcode=em20221201-26348&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26348%2E1203867%2EKR61Ei ]Please, help support our work to move the Democratic Party to the left
by electing more leaders like AOC and Cori Bush by making a
$3 donation before midnight tonight.

Thank you so much,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26348%2E1203867%2EKR61Ei ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26348%2E1203867%2EKR61Ei ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221201-26348-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26348_1203867_KR61Ei&akid=26348%2E1203867%2EKR61Ei

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26348%2E1203867%2EKR61Ei

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

"I am proud to endorse fellow veteran Delegate John McGuire for Virginia State Senate 10. John is a father, Navy SEAL, and business owner with a unique ability to bring people together to solve problems. John has a solid conservative voting record, including a Family Foundation Score of 100% and a VCDL score of 100%. Please join me in my support of John McGuire for Virginia State Senate District 10 in 2023!"

-Rear Admiral [Patrick Driscoll](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MXk4OJkuEe4M-u7GqedRH5WcPcT3igKdFM9nLTXsdA0DG1sV6RqFy_gCit2yyA_etiDILku3EA4d2KPmpuXTt8ylJVtHPegmq4aXHn3zWiRFJADmd3FKKhQAmUvCaOACxwviBoe4KExL0Laavjc9A9tphmZEw7KtCfYTlPNP61558gNqiMj95UcXqOm9b3-toI18x2wqNes=&c=phFgxsbbj6VykY-wKWwCKOUVksXmoWKAam67Q1pBSyTZ2yOqgJgmWw==&ch=3hSHyDJOeCIDB0hvWz8tazS0Op1PLNX1iwtxcmcsOknBZXvVilVNmQ==) (ret.)
-Blue Angels Flight Leader
-Lake Anna Resident Louisa County

Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MXk4OJkuEe4M-u7GqedRH5WcPcT3igKdFM9nLTXsdA0DG1sV6RqFy_gCit2yyA_etiDILku3EA4d2KPmpuXTt8ylJVtHPegmq4aXHn3zWiRFJADmd3FKKhQAmUvCaOACxwviBoe4KExL0Laavjc9A9tphmZEw7KtCfYTlPNP61558gNqiMj95UcXqOm9b3-toI18x2wqNes=&c=phFgxsbbj6VykY-wKWwCKOUVksXmoWKAam67Q1pBSyTZ2yOqgJgmWw==&ch=3hSHyDJOeCIDB0hvWz8tazS0Op1PLNX1iwtxcmcsOknBZXvVilVNmQ==)
---
| It is a huge honor to receive the endorsement of Admiral Pat Driscoll. I have enjoyed getting to know Pat and his family while campaigning and representing Louisa County in District 56 for the last 5 years. Pat has 46 combat missions and understands the importance of reliable leadership in our country. I am fired up, full of energy, and ready to continue fighting for you in State Senate District 10. This election, TBD, will most likely be in the Spring of 2023.
---
| | |
---|---
|
Senate District 10 Counties:

Hanover
Powhatan
Louisa
Fluvanna
Goochland
Buckingham
Appomattox
Amelia
Prince Edward
Cumberland
| Our country is hanging by a string. To win, it is vital that fellow Republicans put petty differences aside and unite. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause.
I would like to meet you and your friends. Please sign up now to be a delegate for the SD 10 convention, TBD, and please share with friends via email here: john@mcguireforvirginia.com Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Help me restore safety 🚨
body:
Peter, The far left continues to embolden criminals while our communities are left unsafe.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ndjmjd-iubikjttk-r/) Peter, The far left continues to embolden criminals while our communities are left unsafe.** ** We've heard countless stories of criminals walking into a store and taking what they want without paying. Law enforcement is unable to do its job effectively. Retailers are victims, punished, forced to lock down items, and pay for security. **Let's take the handcuffs off law enforcement, take back our streets, and remove rogue District Attorneys who are out of touch and refuse to enforce laws. ** Crime is a massive issue among many others I intend to rectify as Congressman.[**Will you help me fight nonsense with common sense and chip in $25 or $50 today?**](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ndjmjd-iubikjttk-y/) [DONATE $25 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ndjmjd-iubikjttk-j/) [DONATE $50 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ndjmjd-iubikjttk-i/) [ANY AMOUNT ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ndjmjd-iubikjttk-d/) As your Congressman-Elect, -> I will WORK to restore law & order.-> I will ADVOCATE for funding the police.-> I will PRIORITIZE safety in our communities.Sincerely,
Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-ndjmjd-iubikjttk-h/)
---

name: Raphael Warnock (via RBG)
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. 's church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.

Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**

[Please, friend, will you chip in $10 or more right now to split between me and Ron Be Gone so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14603?t=6&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8) [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14604?t=7&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8) I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.

**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever.**

[So please, folks, I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more between me and Ron Be Gone to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14603?t=8&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Raphael Warnock and Ron Be Gone will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14605?t=9&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14606?t=10&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14607?t=11&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14608?t=12&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/14609?t=13&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8)
Thank you,

Reverend Warnock
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1600%2E564421%2EcfQ9Z8).**

name: Kati
subject: Reaching out about Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/11361?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221201-Kati-WarnockAccomplishments-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221201-Kati-WarnockAccomplishments-ETG-sl1&akid=8999%2E9716520%2EkJWbl_)
---
Hi there, it’s Kati.

[**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to send $5 to the DSCC -- and if you do, a group of generous donors will turn it into $20 to help fight for our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11361?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221201-Kati-WarnockAccomplishments-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221201-Kati-WarnockAccomplishments-ETG-sl1&akid=8999%2E9716520%2EkJWbl_)

But before I do that, I want to talk to you about the **_most important_** race your gift could impact: Senator Raphael Warnock's runoff in Georgia. And there are **two critical things** I want you to know about him.

**First, almost nothing we’ve accomplished these past two years would have been possible without Sen. Warnock.** Just think about what that already means for our future:

\-- We confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court.
\-- We passed the most significant gun safety reforms _in a generation._
\-- We lowered health care costs and prescription drug prices for _millions_ of Americans.
\-- We invested billions of dollars in American manufacturing, infrastructure, and more -- creating _**millions**_ of good-paying jobs.

Our Democratic Senate majority made all of this possible. It empowered President Biden to _deliver_ for Americans like you and me. And we wouldn’t have this majority if Democrats hadn’t won _both_ Georgia runoffs last year -- including Senator Warnock’s race.

**And that brings me to my second point: Senator Warnock is in another runoff in just a few days, and he needs our help.** He’s running against Trump’s handpicked candidate, and a recent poll shows Sen. Warnock _trailing._

But I know this grassroots team. **_I just watched us crush every prediction and SAVE our Democratic majority, so I know we're ready to step up again and EXPAND it by re-electing Sen. Warnock._**

We’ve set a goal to raise $1,000,000 by midnight to fight for our Senate majority. It’s ambitious, but I know we can do it. And to make sure we get it done, we’ve unlocked a special _Quadruple-Impact Match_ until midnight. **So please:**

[**Donate $5 _(becomes $20)_ to fight for our Senate majority by electing Democrats like Raphael Warnock. Everything we’ve accomplished -- and everything we’ll continue to work toward -- is at stake, and your gift could make all the difference.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11361?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221201-Kati-WarnockAccomplishments-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221201-Kati-WarnockAccomplishments-ETG-sl1&akid=8999%2E9716520%2EkJWbl_)

| | [DONATE $5 (BECOMES $20)](https://go.dscc.org/go/11361?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221201-Kati-WarnockAccomplishments-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221201-Kati-WarnockAccomplishments-ETG-sl1&akid=8999%2E9716520%2EkJWbl_)
---

Thank you. We’re so grateful to have you with us in the home stretch.

Kati
Chief Digital Officer, DSCC
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=8999_9716520_kJWbl_&akid=8999%2E9716520%2EkJWbl_)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=8999%2E9716520%2EkJWbl_)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8999%2E9716520%2EkJWbl_)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
